Division of labor: (1) Zhipu AI—provides GLM-5.2 and GLM-5.2 Air model weights and training-technique support. (2) SAP—runs private-cloud hosting within the EU (Frankfurt-1 and Dublin-1 dual zones), integrated into SAP RISE enterprise ERP cloud. (3) Mistral—handles EU AI Act compliance wrapping, including GPAI-SR systemic-risk assessment, transparency docs, red-team test evidence, and energy-usage disclosure across five technical packages. These five packages are mandatory market-entry gates for foundation models in the EU, and neither Anthropic nor xAI have fully met them over the past 12 months—Zhipu bypassed the gap by partnering with Mistral. GLM-5.2 thereby enters the target sales list of 3,200 EU large enterprises and government clients—including Siemens, Volkswagen, Bayer, TotalEnergies, Airbus, Deutsche Bank, Royal Dutch Shell, and Nokia. Pricing explicitly targets 'break Claude Opus and GPT-5.6': GLM-5.2 at €1.5 input / €6 output per 1M tokens—65% cheaper than Claude Opus 4.6 at comparable capability. SAP Chief Strategy Officer Juergen Mueller said onstage: 'GLM-5.2 is the foundation model SAP believes most likely to become the EU-enterprise default among all we have evaluated and validated over the past five years.' This partnership joins ByteDance Doubao Global and Alibaba Qwen on AWS this same week—China's three-line penetration of the three largest global economic blocs (US / EU / Middle-East-India-Africa) locked in within a single week.
key_points: GLM-5.2 首个通过 EU AI Act「基础模型系统性风险」审查的中国大模型
三方分工：智谱出模型 + SAP 欧盟私有云托管 + Mistral 合规封装
目标客户 3200 家欧盟大企业与政府（西门子/大众/拜耳/道达尔/空客等）
GLM-5.2 定价欧元 1.5/6，比 Claude Opus 4.6 便宜 65%
key_points_en: GLM-5.2: first Chinese LLM to pass EU AI Act GPAI-Systemic Risk review
Three-way split: Zhipu (model) + SAP (EU private cloud) + Mistral (compliance wrapping)
Target: 3,200 EU large enterprises and government (Siemens, VW, Bayer, TotalEnergies, Airbus…)
GLM-5.2 priced at €1.5/€6 per 1M tokens—65% cheaper than Claude Opus 4.6

articles.title: WAIC 2026 两日倒计时：55 国 1400＋ 位中外嘉宾、9 位图灵/诺奖得主、300＋ 全球首发、45 家海外顶级 AI 公司首次参展——中国 AI 出海主场时刻
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 T-Minus 2 Days: 1,400+ Delegates from 55 Countries, 9 Turing/Nobel Laureates, 300+ Global Debuts, 45 Top Overseas AI Firms Exhibiting for the First Time—China AI's Home-Court Overseas Moment
articles.summary: WAIC 2026（世界人工智能大会）7 月 17 日在上海开幕，进入 2 天倒计时——主办方 7 月 15 日更新数据：55 国 1400＋ 位中外嘉宾（含 9 位图灵奖/诺奖得主）、1100＋ 家参展企业（其中海外 210 家）、3000＋ 展品、300＋ 全球首发、140＋ 场论坛。45 家海外顶级 AI 公司首次参展，包括 Anthropic、Perplexity、Cursor、Mistral、Cohere、Runway、ElevenLabs、Suno、AI21、Aleph Alpha 等。这将是中国大模型 5 年来第一次真正意义上「主场化」的全球 AI 行业年会。
articles.summary_en: WAIC 2026 (World AI Conference) opens July 17 in Shanghai—T-minus 2 days. Organizers updated on July 15: 1,400+ delegates from 55 countries (including 9 Turing/Nobel laureates), 1,100+ exhibiting companies (210 overseas), 3,000+ exhibits, 300+ global debuts, 140+ forums. 45 top overseas AI companies are exhibiting for the first time, including Anthropic, Perplexity, Cursor, Mistral, Cohere, Runway, ElevenLabs, Suno, AI21, and Aleph Alpha. This will be the first genuinely 'home-court-hosted' global AI industry annual convention for China's LLM camp in five years.
articles.source: WAIC 2026 组委会 / 上海市经信委
articles.content: WAIC 2026（世界人工智能大会）主办方 7 月 15 日上午在上海世博展览馆召开开幕前最后一次媒体沟通会——距 7 月 17 日开幕仅 2 天。更新的数据：55 国 1400＋ 位中外嘉宾（比 WAIC 2025 的 40 国 1200＋ 增加 15 国）、1100＋ 家参展企业（其中海外 210 家，占比 19%——WAIC 2024 时海外占比仅 6%）、3000＋ 展品、300＋ 全球首发、140＋ 场论坛、9 位图灵奖/诺奖得主（Yoshua Bengio、Geoffrey Hinton、John Hopfield、Demis Hassabis、Jack Dongarra、Ed Feigenbaum、Alan Kay 等）。首次参展的 45 家海外顶级 AI 公司名单几乎覆盖硅谷所有一线——Anthropic（欧洲区总经理 Jared Kaplan 出席）、Perplexity（Aravind Srinivas 亲自到场）、Cursor（联合创始人 Michael Truell 出席）、Mistral（Arthur Mensch 出席）、Cohere、Runway、ElevenLabs、Suno、AI21 Labs、Aleph Alpha、DeepMind（工程副总裁 Oriol Vinyals 出席，代表 Google）、Boston Dynamics（Marc Raibert 荣誉出席）、Figure、1X Technologies、Physical Intelligence、Skild AI、Tesla Optimus 团队。这个名单意味着——WAIC 2026 是过去 5 年里第一次「硅谷 AI 头部＋中国 AI 头部」在同一个物理会场对等展出的年会。开幕主论坛「AI 治理与全球共识」上，中方将首次公开由清华、上海 AI 实验室、北大、复旦、蚂蚁数科联合起草的《AI Global Consensus Draft 2026》——这是中国大模型全球化后第一份对外主张的「治理框架」，与 EU AI Act、美国 NIST RMF、英国 Bletchley Declaration 并列为 2026 年 AI 治理四大文件。上海市经信委主任张英说：「WAIC 2025 之前，是『世界来看中国 AI』；WAIC 2026 之后，是『中国 AI 与世界并肩』。」
articles.content_en: WAIC 2026 organizers held a final pre-opening media briefing at Shanghai World Expo Exhibition Hall on the morning of July 15—T-minus 2 days to the July 17 opening. Updated data: 1,400+ delegates from 55 countries (vs. WAIC 2025's 40 countries and 1,200+—up 15 countries), 1,100+ exhibiting companies (210 overseas—19% share; WAIC 2024's overseas share was just 6%), 3,000+ exhibits, 300+ global debuts, 140+ forums, 9 Turing/Nobel laureates (Yoshua Bengio, Geoffrey Hinton, John Hopfield, Demis Hassabis, Jack Dongarra, Ed Feigenbaum, Alan Kay, and more). The 45 overseas top-AI companies exhibiting for the first time cover virtually all Silicon Valley first-tier players—Anthropic (Europe GM Jared Kaplan), Perplexity (Aravind Srinivas in person), Cursor (co-founder Michael Truell), Mistral (Arthur Mensch), Cohere, Runway, ElevenLabs, Suno, AI21 Labs, Aleph Alpha, DeepMind (VP Oriol Vinyals for Google), Boston Dynamics (Marc Raibert honorary), Figure, 1X Technologies, Physical Intelligence, Skild AI, Tesla Optimus team. This roster means WAIC 2026 is the first annual convention in five years to have 'top Silicon Valley AI + top Chinese AI' exhibit as peers in the same physical venue. At the opening main forum 'AI Governance and Global Consensus,' the Chinese side will publicly release the 'AI Global Consensus Draft 2026' jointly drafted by Tsinghua, Shanghai AI Lab, Peking University, Fudan, and Ant Digital—the first outward 'governance framework' China's LLM camp has proposed since going global, ranking alongside EU AI Act, US NIST RMF, and UK Bletchley Declaration as one of the four defining AI-governance documents of 2026. Shanghai MEIT Director Zhang Ying said: 'Before WAIC 2025, it was the world looking at China's AI. After WAIC 2026, it is China's AI standing shoulder-to-shoulder with the world.'
key_points: 55 国 1400＋ 中外嘉宾、9 位图灵/诺奖得主、300＋ 全球首发、140＋ 场论坛
海外参展 210 家（占比 19%，WAIC 2024 仅 6%）——「主场化」拐点
45 家海外一线首参：Anthropic / Perplexity / Cursor / Mistral / DeepMind / Boston Dynamics 等
首次发布《AI Global Consensus Draft 2026》，与 EU AI Act、NIST RMF、Bletchley 并列 4 大文件
key_points_en: 1,400+ delegates from 55 countries, 9 Turing/Nobel laureates, 300+ global debuts, 140+ forums
210 overseas exhibitors (19% share vs 6% at WAIC 2024)—home-court inflection
45 top overseas first-timers: Anthropic / Perplexity / Cursor / Mistral / DeepMind / Boston Dynamics…
China releases 'AI Global Consensus Draft 2026'—ranks with EU AI Act, NIST RMF, Bletchley as one of 2026's four defining AI-governance documents

hero.title: 「AI 消费元年」叩门：国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》＋八部门《AI+消费》＋WAIC 2026 首发季，同一周把中国 AI 产业推向「下游落地」新拐点
hero.title_en: China's 'AI-Consumer Year' Arrives: State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan + 8-Ministry 'AI+Consumption' Directive + WAIC 2026 Debut Season Pivot the Industry Downstream
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 13 日中国政府网正式挂出国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》——目标 2030 年社零总额 60 万亿元，把「深入推进人工智能＋消费」写进纲领；同一周，商务部等八部门联合印发的《人工智能＋消费实施意见》（商建发2026 年第 89 号，5 大方面 17 条举措）进入落地窗口，个人消费贷款贴息首次覆盖 AI 产品购买。7 月 13 日上海张江与徐汇分别迎来两大重磅——阶跃星辰发布全球首个大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX、首款智能体手机 STEPX Neo 与智能体原生系统 Step AOS；东方算芯发布并量产基于国产 14nm 的全球首款 3D 堆叠近存计算 AI 芯片 DF1000。距 WAIC 2026（7 月 17-20 日，上海三地四馆、10 万平方米、1100 余家企业）开幕只剩 3 天。这一周把中国 AI 产业的重心从「上游算力/模型军备」明确拨向「下游消费级红利」，「AI 消费元年」正式叩门。
hero.summary_en: On July 13, 2026, China's State Council formally released the 15th Five-Year Consumption Expansion Plan (No. 66)—targeting RMB 60 trillion in retail sales by 2030 and writing 'deepen AI+Consumption' into the national blueprint. The same week, the joint 8-ministry Implementation Opinions on AI+Consumption (5 pillars, 17 measures) entered execution—individual consumer-loan interest subsidies now cover AI product purchases for the first time. Also on July 13, Shanghai Zhangjiang saw Zhixinghe Technology (StepFun) launch STEPX, the world's first LLM-native AI terminal brand, with agentic phone STEPX Neo and agent-native OS Step AOS; Dongfang Suanxin taped out and shipped DF1000, the world's first 3D-stacked near-memory AI chip on domestic 14nm. WAIC 2026 opens in 3 days (July 17-20, 100,000 sqm across Shanghai's three sites and four halls, 1,100+ exhibitors). This week decisively shifts China's AI center of gravity from 'upstream compute/model arms race' to 'downstream consumer-grade payoff'—the 'AI Consumer Year' has officially arrived.

articles.title: OpenRouter 7 月第 2 周数据：腾讯 Hy3 (free) 登顶、中国大模型连续 11 周霸榜、全球周调用量突破 54.6 万亿 Token
articles.title_en: OpenRouter Week 2 of July: Tencent Hy3 (free) Tops the Chart, Chinese Models Dominate 11 Weeks in a Row, Global Weekly Tokens Break 54.6 Trillion
articles.summary: OpenRouter 最新周报（7 月 6-12 日）显示，全球 Token 调用量 54.6 万亿，环比＋12.6%；中国 AI 大模型 27.58 万亿 Token（＋17.61%，连续 7 周增长），是美国 6.33 万亿的 4.36 倍；中国大模型周调用量连续 11 周超过美国。前六名全部为中国模型：腾讯 Hy3 (free) 以 6.13 万亿登顶终结 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 七连冠，小米 MiMo-V2.5 第二 5.95 万亿，DeepSeek-V4-Flash 第三 5.22 万亿。英伟达 Nemotron 3 Ultra 以＋109% 增速首次登榜第八，推理成本仅头部闭源模型的 1/10。
articles.summary_en: OpenRouter's July 6-12 weekly report: global weekly tokens hit 54.6 trillion (+12.6% WoW); Chinese AI models processed 27.58 trillion tokens (+17.61%, 7-week rising streak), 4.36x the US total (6.33T); Chinese models have outpaced US models for 11 consecutive weeks. The top six are all Chinese: Tencent Hy3 (free) took #1 with 6.13T tokens, ending DeepSeek-V4-Flash's 7-week reign; Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 #2 at 5.95T; DeepSeek-V4-Flash #3 at 5.22T. Nvidia's Nemotron 3 Ultra debuts at #8 with +109% growth—inference cost just 1/10 of the leading closed models.
articles.content: OpenRouter 官方 7 月 13 日凌晨更新的周报把中国大模型在全球开发者调用市场的领先优势推到了新高。7 月 6-12 日全球所有大模型周调用 Token 量达到 54.6 万亿，环比＋12.6%——继 6 月末破 50 万亿之后，7 月第 2 周继续拉高上限。分区来看，中国 AI 大模型合计 27.58 万亿 Token（＋17.61%，连续 7 周增长），美国 6.33 万亿（＋47.9%，反弹但基数低）——中国是美国的 4.36 倍，中国大模型的周 Token 调用量已经连续 11 周超过美国。榜单前六名全部为中国模型：腾讯 Hy3 (free) 以 6.13 万亿夺得第一，终结 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 的七连冠；小米 MiMo-V2.5 以 5.95 万亿（＋36%）逼近榜首；DeepSeek-V4-Flash 以 5.22 万亿（-2%）滑落第三；MiniMax M3 4.26 万亿（＋4%）第四；智谱 GLM 5.2 3.19 万亿（＋24%）第五。最亮眼的黑马是英伟达自研 Nemotron 3 Ultra——2.04 万亿（＋109%）首次登榜第八，6 月 4 日上线不满 6 周即杀入前十，推理成本仅头部闭源模型的 1/10。腾讯 Hy3 是 2950 亿参数 MoE、激活 210 亿、256K 上下文，SWE-bench Pro 57.9% 反超 DeepSeek V4 Pro，发布日腾讯股价单日＋4.82%。更值得关注的信号——美国企业用中国模型的 Token 占比在 2026 年 2 月起稳定超过 30%，最高触及 46%（2025 年上半年仅 4.5%）——中国大模型不只是「在开发者社区免费的领先」，正在真实穿透美国企业付费栈。
articles.content_en: OpenRouter's weekly report released early on July 13 pushed Chinese LLMs to a new frontier in the global developer market. Global weekly tokens hit 54.6 trillion (+12.6% WoW)—continuing to raise the ceiling after breaking 50T in late June. Chinese AI models processed 27.58T tokens (+17.61%, 7-week rising streak) vs US models at 6.33T (+47.9%, low-base rebound). Chinese is 4.36x US; Chinese weekly token calls have exceeded US for 11 consecutive weeks. The top six are all Chinese: Tencent Hy3 (free) took #1 at 6.13T, ending DeepSeek-V4-Flash's 7-week reign; Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 #2 at 5.95T (+36%); DeepSeek-V4-Flash slipped to #3 at 5.22T (-2%); MiniMax M3 #4 at 4.26T (+4%); Zhipu GLM 5.2 #5 at 3.19T (+24%). The dark horse: Nvidia's in-house Nemotron 3 Ultra debuts at #8 at 2.04T (+109%)—breaking into top-10 within 6 weeks of its June 4 launch, with inference cost 1/10 of leading closed models. Hy3 is a 295B MoE with 21B active parameters, 256K context, and 57.9% on SWE-bench Pro (beating DeepSeek V4 Pro); Tencent's stock jumped +4.82% on launch day. The bigger signal: US-enterprise share of Chinese-model tokens has been stable above 30% since Feb 2026, peaking at 46% (vs only 4.5% in H1 2025)—Chinese LLMs are no longer just 'community-leading and free', they are penetrating US enterprise paid stacks for real.
key_points: 全球周 Token 54.6 万亿（＋12.6% WoW），中国 27.58 万亿是美国 6.33 万亿的 4.36 倍
腾讯 Hy3 (free) 6.13 万亿登顶，终结 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 七连冠；前六名全部为中国模型
英伟达 Nemotron 3 Ultra ＋109% 首次登榜第八，推理成本 1/10；美国企业用中国模型占比稳定 >30%
腾讯 Hy3 参数 295B MoE 激活 21B，256K 上下文，SWE-bench Pro 57.9% 反超 DeepSeek V4 Pro
key_points_en: Global weekly tokens 54.6T (+12.6% WoW); Chinese 27.58T is 4.36x US 6.33T
Tencent Hy3 (free) took #1 at 6.13T, ending DeepSeek-V4-Flash's 7-week reign; top 6 all Chinese
Nvidia Nemotron 3 Ultra +109% debuts at #8 with 1/10 inference cost; US-enterprise share of Chinese tokens stable above 30%
Tencent Hy3: 295B MoE, 21B active, 256K context, 57.9% on SWE-bench Pro (beats DeepSeek V4 Pro)

articles.title: 国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》正式公开：目标 2030 社零 60 万亿元，「深入推进人工智能＋消费」列为国家战略
articles.title_en: State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Expansion Plan Goes Public: RMB 60 Trillion Retail Target by 2030, 'Deepen AI+Consumption' Written Into National Strategy
articles.summary: 7 月 13 日中国政府网正式挂出《国务院关于扩大消费的「十五五」规划的批复》（国函〔2026〕66 号，签署日期 2026 年 7 月 2 日）。这份 5 年国家消费战略把目标定在 2030 年社会消费品零售总额 60 万亿元，首次把「深入推进人工智能＋消费」列为规划核心内容之一——明确要求增加 AI 手机与电脑、智能穿戴、智能机器人、桌面级 3D 打印设备等新一代智能终端产品有效供给。政府同时定调「个人消费贷款财政贴息 + 数码产品购新补贴 + 以旧换新」三重政策组合拳把 AI 产品拉进补贴清单。上海财大预测每年拉动万亿级新增消费。
articles.summary_en: On July 13, gov.cn released the State Council's Reply on the 15th Five-Year Consumption Expansion Plan (No. 66, signed July 2, 2026). This 5-year national blueprint targets RMB 60 trillion in consumer retail sales by 2030 and, for the first time, elevates 'deepen AI+Consumption' to a core strategic pillar—explicitly requiring more effective supply of AI phones and PCs, smart wearables, intelligent robots, and desktop 3D printers. The Council pairs this with a three-pronged policy combo: individual consumer-loan interest subsidies, digital product trade-in vouchers, and green trade-in, all now covering AI products. Shanghai University of Finance & Economics forecasts trillion-yuan-scale annual incremental consumption.
articles.source: 中国政府网 / 央视新闻
articles.content: 7 月 13 日《国务院关于扩大消费的「十五五」规划的批复》（国函〔2026〕66 号，签署日期 2026 年 7 月 2 日）正式在中国政府网公开。这份 5 年消费战略把「2030 年社会消费品零售总额达到 60 万亿元」写进目标，2025 年该数据为 48.79 万亿元——意味着未来 5 年年均复合增速需要 4.2%，需要新增长引擎接续。规划把「深入推进人工智能＋消费」列为最优先的新型消费方向，明确要求「增加 AI 手机和电脑、智能穿戴、智能机器人、桌面级 3D 打印设备等新一代智能终端产品有效供给」。「AI 消费元年」的政策底座由两份文件搭起：其一，八部门（商务部＋发改委＋中央网信办＋教育部＋工信部＋民政部＋住建部＋文旅部）联合印发的《关于加快数字消费扩容升级 深入推进人工智能＋消费的实施意见》（商建发 2026 年第 89 号），5 大方面 17 条举措，2026 年 6 月 18 日印发、7 月 1 日公开；其二，本次国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》。政策工具箱三重叠加——数码产品购新补贴、以旧换新、个人消费贷款财政贴息——首次把 AI 产品纳入贴息覆盖。市场端反馈已经出现：商务大数据 2026 年 1-4 月智能助行外骨骼网零额同比＋785.5%，4 月智能眼镜＋175.2%，人形机器人＋20.6%。上海财大消费大数据中心预测「AI＋消费」每年拉动万亿级新增消费——把中国 AI 产业的重心从「上游算力/模型军备」明确拨向「下游消费级红利」。
articles.content_en: On July 13 gov.cn officially published the State Council's Reply on the 15th Five-Year Consumption Expansion Plan (No. 66, signed July 2, 2026). This 5-year national plan targets RMB 60 trillion in retail sales by 2030—up from RMB 48.79 trillion in 2025, implying a 4.2% CAGR that needs a new growth engine. The plan elevates 'deepen AI+Consumption' to a top-priority consumption pillar, mandating 'greater effective supply of AI phones and PCs, smart wearables, intelligent robots, and desktop 3D printers'. The policy foundation of the 'AI Consumer Year' rests on two documents: (1) the 8-ministry (MOFCOM, NDRC, CAC, MOE, MIIT, MCA, MOHURD, MCT) Implementation Opinions on Accelerating Digital Consumption and Deepening AI+Consumption (No. 89, issued June 18, 2026, public July 1)—5 pillars, 17 measures; and (2) the current State Council 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan. Policy toolbox stacks three lever: digital product trade-in vouchers, green trade-in, and individual consumer-loan interest subsidies—now covering AI product purchases for the first time. Market signals are already up: MOFCOM big data shows Jan-Apr 2026 online sales of smart mobility exoskeletons +785.5% YoY, smart glasses +175.2% (April), humanoid robots +20.6%. SUFE's Consumption Big-Data Center forecasts trillion-yuan-scale annual incremental consumption—decisively shifting China's AI center of gravity from 'upstream compute/model arms race' to 'downstream consumer-grade payoff'.
key_points: 国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》（国函〔2026〕66 号）7 月 13 日公开，目标 2030 社零 60 万亿元
「深入推进人工智能＋消费」列为规划核心：AI 手机/电脑/智能穿戴/机器人/3D 打印
八部门《AI＋消费实施意见》5 方面 17 举措 + 个人消费贷款贴息首次覆盖 AI 产品
商务大数据：智能助行外骨骼＋785.5%、智能眼镜＋175.2%、人形机器人＋20.6%
key_points_en: State Council 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan (No. 66) public on July 13; RMB 60 trillion retail target by 2030
'Deepen AI+Consumption' becomes core: AI phones/PCs, wearables, robots, 3D printers
8-ministry AI+Consumption Directive (5 pillars, 17 measures) + consumer-loan subsidies now cover AI products
MOFCOM big data: smart exoskeletons +785.5%, smart glasses +175.2%, humanoid robots +20.6%

articles.title: WAIC 2026 进入 3 天倒计时：10 万平方米、1100 余家企业、300 款全球首发，「智能伙伴 共创未来」在上海开场
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Enters 3-Day Countdown: 100,000 sqm, 1,100+ Exhibitors, 300+ Global Debuts—'Intelligent Companion, Shared Future' Opens in Shanghai
articles.summary: 第九届世界人工智能大会（WAIC 2026）将于 7 月 17-20 日在上海世博/张江/西岸「三地四馆」举办，主题「智能伙伴 共创未来」。展览面积首次突破 10 万平方米，1100 余家企业参展、3000 余项展品、超 300 款产品全球首发。140 余场论坛、1400 余位中外嘉宾、9 位图灵奖/诺奖得主。WAIC Academic 由姚期智主持，收到 9 国 284 篇投稿。智算、具身两大赛道各集结 200+ 家企业。已促成 57 个产业场景落地、达成 162 亿元意向合作。2025 年上海规上 AI 企业产业规模 6370 亿元（＋39.5%）。
articles.summary_en: The 9th World AI Conference (WAIC 2026) opens July 17-20 across Shanghai's three-site four-hall complex (Expo Center / Zhangjiang / West Bund), themed 'Intelligent Companion, Shared Future'. Exhibition area breaks 100,000 sqm for the first time, with 1,100+ exhibitors, 3,000+ exhibits, and 300+ global product launches. 140+ forums bring together 1,400+ Chinese and international speakers, including 9 Turing/Nobel laureates. WAIC Academic, chaired by Andrew Yao, received 284 papers from 9 countries. Intelligent-compute and embodied AI each mobilize 200+ companies. 57 industrial pilots have been finalized and RMB 16.2 billion in letters of intent signed. Shanghai's above-scale AI industry hit RMB 637 billion in 2025 (+39.5%).
articles.source: 央视新闻 / 上海科技报
articles.source_en: CCTV News / Shanghai Science & Technology News
articles.content: 第九届世界人工智能大会（WAIC 2026）将于 7 月 17-20 日在上海世博/张江/西岸「三地四馆」举办，主题「智能伙伴 共创未来」。这是 WAIC 举办 9 届以来体量最大的一届——展览面积首次突破 10 万平方米，1100 余家企业参展、3000 余项展品、超 300 款产品全球首发。140 余场论坛、1400 余位中外嘉宾、9 位图灵奖 / 诺奖得主。学术侧 WAIC Academic 由姚期智主持，收到 9 国 284 篇投稿；产业侧智算与具身智能两大赛道各集结 200+ 家企业，覆盖芯片、云、模型、机器人、AI＋医疗/教育/工业等全链条。截至开幕前，主办方公布已促成 57 个产业场景落地、达成 162 亿元意向合作。上海作为主办地的产业底座已在 2025 年跑通规模：规上 AI 企业产业规模 6370 亿元（＋39.5%），169 款大模型通过备案，AI 人才近 30 万。WAIC 2026 与国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》、八部门《AI＋消费实施意见》三份文件在同一周落地——形成了「政策纲领 + 产业落地 + 全球平台」三足鼎立的中国 AI 消费化叙事底盘。
articles.content_en: The 9th World AI Conference (WAIC 2026) opens July 17-20 across Shanghai's 'three-site four-hall' complex (Expo Center / Zhangjiang / West Bund), themed 'Intelligent Companion, Shared Future'. This is the biggest WAIC in its 9-year history—exhibition area breaks 100,000 sqm for the first time, with 1,100+ exhibitors, 3,000+ exhibits, and 300+ global product launches. 140+ forums, 1,400+ Chinese and international speakers, and 9 Turing/Nobel laureates. On the academic side, WAIC Academic (chaired by Andrew Yao) received 284 papers from 9 countries. On the industrial side, intelligent-compute and embodied AI each mobilize 200+ companies, covering chips, cloud, models, robotics, and AI+healthcare/education/industry across the full stack. As of the eve of opening, organizers report 57 industrial pilots finalized and RMB 16.2 billion in letters of intent signed. Shanghai's host-city base is already at scale: above-scale AI industry reached RMB 637 billion in 2025 (+39.5%), 169 large models cleared regulatory filing, and the AI talent pool approached 300,000. WAIC 2026 lands in the same week as the State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan and the 8-ministry AI+Consumption Directive—a tripod of 'policy blueprint + industrial execution + global platform' anchoring China's AI-to-consumer narrative.
key_points: 7 月 17-20 日上海「三地四馆」，展览面积首破 10 万平方米
1100+ 家企业、3000+ 展品、300+ 全球首发、140+ 场论坛、9 位图灵奖/诺奖得主
已促成 57 个产业场景落地、162 亿元意向合作；智算/具身各集结 200+ 家企业
2025 上海规上 AI 产业规模 6370 亿元（＋39.5%）；169 款大模型完成备案
key_points_en: July 17-20, Shanghai three-site four-hall; exhibition area breaks 100,000 sqm for first time
1,100+ exhibitors, 3,000+ exhibits, 300+ global debuts, 140+ forums, 9 Turing/Nobel laureates
57 industrial pilots finalized, RMB 16.2B in LoIs signed; intelligent-compute and embodied AI each with 200+ companies
Shanghai above-scale AI industry RMB 637B in 2025 (+39.5%); 169 large models cleared filing

articles.title: Meta 首款自研 AI 训练芯片 Iris/MTIA 400 将于 9 月量产：4 代项目定型、TSMC 代工、2026 部署 7 GW 算力
articles.title_en: Meta's First In-House AI Training Chip Iris/MTIA 400 Enters Mass Production in September—4th-Gen Project Finalized, TSMC Fab, 7 GW Deployment in 2026
articles.summary: 路透 7 月 9 日独家报道，Meta 首款自研 AI 训练芯片代号 Iris（MTIA 400），MTIA 项目第 4 代，将于 2026 年 9 月正式量产。芯片由 Meta 与 Broadcom 联合设计、TSMC 代工，测试 6 周未发现重大问题。此举旨在减少对英伟达 GPU 的深度依赖。Meta 已披露 2026 年部署 7 GW 算力（H1 建成 1GW + H2 追加 5.5GW / 备忘录版本 2.5GW），2027 计划翻倍至 14 GW，2026 CAPEX 上限 1450 亿美元。已与三星（内存）、闪迪（闪存）、住友电工（光纤）签订长期供货协议。
articles.summary_en: Reuters reported exclusively on July 9 that Meta's first in-house AI training chip, code-named Iris (MTIA 400)—the 4th-generation MTIA project—will enter mass production in September 2026. The chip is co-designed with Broadcom and fabricated by TSMC, with 6 weeks of testing showing no major issues. The move aims to reduce Meta's deep dependence on Nvidia GPUs. Meta has disclosed 7 GW of AI compute deployment in 2026 (H1 1 GW built + H2 5.5 GW added / an internal memo cites 2.5 GW), doubling to 14 GW in 2027, with 2026 CAPEX capped at $145B. Long-term supply agreements are signed with Samsung (memory), SanDisk (flash), and Sumitomo Electric (fiber).
articles.content: 路透社 7 月 9 日援引两位知情人士独家披露：Meta 首款自研 AI 训练芯片代号 Iris（对外命名 MTIA 400），是 Meta MTIA 项目第 4 代产品，将于 2026 年 9 月正式量产。芯片由 Meta 与博通（Broadcom）联合设计、台积电（TSMC）代工，测试 6 周未发现重大问题。这是 Meta 摆脱英伟达 GPU 深度依赖战略的关键里程碑——过去 3 年 Meta 每年向英伟达采购超过 400 亿美元 H100/H200/Blackwell 芯片，2026 年为最大英伟达单一客户之一。Iris 之外，Meta 的算力路线图已经全面明牌：2026 年 AI 算力部署目标 7 GW（H1 已建成 1 GW，H2 追加 5.5 GW，备忘录版本 2.5 GW，两个数据均可采信），2027 年翻倍至 14 GW；2026 年资本开支上限 1450 亿美元，其中 AI 基础设施占比超过 65%。为配合 Iris 量产，Meta 已经与三星（内存 HBM4）、闪迪（企业级闪存）、住友电工（数据中心光纤）签订多年期长期供货协议——大摩把这一轮供应链锁定称为「chipflation」（芯片通胀），因为需求端集中签约推高上游长期价格。同一周（7 月 13 日）Meta 首席 AI 科学家 Yann LeCun 传出即将离职并创立自己的公司，Meta 内部押注 Iris/MTIA 400 的量产与自研 AI 芯片战略成为「后 LeCun 时代」最重要的锚。
articles.content_en: On July 9 Reuters exclusively reported, citing two sources: Meta's first in-house AI training chip is code-named Iris (external name MTIA 400)—the 4th generation of Meta's MTIA project—and enters mass production in September 2026. The chip is co-designed with Broadcom and fabricated by TSMC, with 6 weeks of testing showing no major issues. This is a milestone in Meta's strategy to reduce deep dependence on Nvidia GPUs—over the past 3 years, Meta has purchased more than $40B/year of H100/H200/Blackwell chips from Nvidia and is a top single customer in 2026. Beyond Iris, Meta's compute roadmap is now public: 2026 AI compute deployment targets 7 GW (H1 already built 1 GW, H2 adds 5.5 GW, with an internal memo citing 2.5 GW—both credible), doubling to 14 GW by 2027; 2026 CAPEX is capped at $145B with AI infrastructure over 65% of that. To support Iris production, Meta has signed multi-year supply agreements with Samsung (HBM4 memory), SanDisk (enterprise flash), and Sumitomo Electric (data-center fiber)—Morgan Stanley calls this supply-chain lock-in 'chipflation', as concentrated long-dated demand lifts upstream prices. In the same week (July 13), reports emerged that Meta Chief AI Scientist Yann LeCun is departing to start his own company—Meta is internally betting on Iris/MTIA 400 mass production as the most important anchor of its 'post-LeCun era'.
key_points: Iris (MTIA 400) 9 月量产，MTIA 项目第 4 代，Broadcom 设计 + TSMC 代工，测试 6 周无重大问题
2026 年 AI 算力部署 7 GW（H1 1GW + H2 5.5GW），2027 翻倍至 14 GW
2026 CAPEX 上限 1450 亿美元，AI 基础设施占比 >65%
与三星 HBM4、闪迪企业闪存、住友电工光纤签长期协议；大摩称「chipflation」
key_points_en: Iris (MTIA 400) enters mass production Sep 2026; 4th-gen MTIA; Broadcom-designed, TSMC-fabbed; 6-week tests clean
2026 AI compute deployment 7 GW (H1 1GW + H2 5.5GW); doubles to 14 GW in 2027
2026 CAPEX capped at $145B; AI infrastructure >65% share
Long-term supply deals with Samsung HBM4, SanDisk enterprise flash, Sumitomo fiber; Morgan Stanley coins 'chipflation'

articles.title: 阶跃星辰发布全球首个大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX、智能体手机 STEPX Neo 与 Step AOS：15 毫秒记忆召回、L3 级智能化
articles.title_en: StepFun Launches STEPX—World's First LLM-Native AI Terminal Brand—Plus Agentic Phone STEPX Neo and Step AOS: 15 ms Memory Recall, L3-Grade Intelligence
articles.summary: 7 月 13 日阶跃星辰在沪发布全球首个大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX、首款智能体手机 STEPX Neo、智能体原生系统 Step AOS 和个人智能体阶跃 Amoo。核心突破：双域三步记忆结构，日常问答记忆召回最快 15 毫秒；端云多脑协同架构；四维安全框架「可信、可见、可控、可逆」；通过首批「人工智能终端智能化分级」L3 级测试。已与携程、支付宝、滴滴、美团、WPS、剪映、高德、京东、百度、微博等合作。旗舰推理模型 Step Pro 即将发布，参数超 1.5 万亿。董事长印奇宣布 100 天共创计划。
articles.summary_en: On July 13 StepFun unveiled the world's first LLM-native AI terminal brand STEPX, along with the flagship agentic phone STEPX Neo, agent-native OS Step AOS, and personal agent Step Amoo, in Shanghai. Core breakthroughs: dual-domain three-tier memory architecture with 15 ms daily-Q&A recall latency; edge-cloud multi-brain collaboration; a four-dimensional safety framework (trustworthy, visible, controllable, reversible); and clearance of the first-batch L3-grade AI-Terminal Intelligence certification. Ecosystem partners include Ctrip, Alipay, Didi, Meituan, WPS, CapCut, AutoNavi, JD, Baidu, and Weibo. The flagship reasoning model Step Pro (>1.5 trillion parameters) will be released next. Chairman Yin Qi announced a 100-Day Co-Creation Program.
articles.content: 7 月 13 日阶跃星辰在沪召开发布会，一口气推出全球首个大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX、首款智能体手机 STEPX Neo、智能体原生操作系统 Step AOS 和个人智能体阶跃 Amoo——这是 2026 年国内 AI 消费级终端最重量级的一次「四合一」发布。Step AOS 的核心创新有三层：其一，双域三步记忆结构，把「即时记忆」「工作记忆」「长期记忆」按用户域与任务域分离部署，日常问答记忆召回最快 15 毫秒；其二，端云多脑协同架构，端侧运行轻量智能体，云侧接入阶跃 Step Pro 旗舰推理（参数超 1.5 万亿）；其三，四维安全框架「可信、可见、可控、可逆」，任何智能体行为均可回溯与撤销。技术侧的硬指标是——STEPX Neo 已通过工信部电子五所主导的首批「人工智能终端智能化分级」L3 级认证（业界目前的最高等级）。生态侧，阶跃与携程、支付宝、滴滴、美团、WPS、剪映、高德、京东、百度、微博等 10 家顶级应用完成 API 深度对接，让用户「一句话完成机票预订、外卖下单、跨 App 内容整理」。发布会同期，阶跃董事长印奇宣布 100 天共创计划，向全球开发者与硬件厂商开放 Step AOS，目标复制安卓早年的生态爆发。这次发布最大的产业信号是——中国大模型公司首次跳出「云端 API」，把智能体做进消费级终端，与国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》「AI 手机作为新一代智能终端」的政策定向精准共振。
articles.content_en: On July 13 StepFun held a launch event in Shanghai, unveiling in one shot the world's first LLM-native AI terminal brand STEPX, the flagship agentic phone STEPX Neo, the agent-native OS Step AOS, and the personal agent Step Amoo—the heaviest 'four-in-one' consumer-grade AI terminal launch in China in 2026. Step AOS has three core innovations: (1) a dual-domain three-tier memory architecture separating 'immediate / working / long-term' memory across user and task domains, delivering daily-Q&A recall at up to 15 ms; (2) an edge-cloud multi-brain architecture running lightweight agents on-device while connecting to the Step Pro flagship reasoning model (>1.5T parameters) in the cloud; (3) a four-dimensional safety framework—trustworthy, visible, controllable, reversible—where every agent action is traceable and reversible. On the hard-metric side, STEPX Neo has passed the first-batch L3-grade certification of the CAICT-led 'AI-Terminal Intelligence Rating' (the current industry ceiling). On the ecosystem side, StepFun has completed deep API integration with 10 top apps: Ctrip, Alipay, Didi, Meituan, WPS, CapCut, AutoNavi, JD, Baidu, Weibo—letting users complete flight bookings, food orders, and cross-app content organization from a single sentence. Chairman Yin Qi announced a 100-Day Co-Creation Program opening Step AOS to global developers and hardware partners, targeting an Android-style ecosystem explosion. The biggest industry signal: for the first time, a Chinese LLM company has jumped out of 'cloud API' and driven agents into a consumer-grade terminal—precisely echoing the State Council's 15th Five-Year Plan direction on 'AI phones as next-generation intelligent terminals'.
key_points: 全球首个大模型原生 AI 终端品牌 STEPX + 智能体手机 STEPX Neo + Step AOS + 阶跃 Amoo
双域三步记忆结构，日常问答召回最快 15 毫秒；端云多脑协同；四维安全框架
通过首批「人工智能终端智能化分级」L3 级认证
旗舰 Step Pro 参数超 1.5 万亿；已与携程/支付宝/滴滴/美团/WPS 等 10 家顶级 App 深度对接
key_points_en: World's first LLM-native AI terminal brand STEPX + agentic phone STEPX Neo + Step AOS + Step Amoo
Dual-domain three-tier memory (15 ms recall), edge-cloud multi-brain, four-dimensional safety framework
Passed first-batch L3-grade 'AI-Terminal Intelligence Rating'
Flagship Step Pro >1.5T parameters; deep API integration with 10 top apps (Ctrip/Alipay/Didi/Meituan/WPS/...)

articles.title: 东方算芯 DF1000 上海张江发布量产：全球首款国产 14nm 3D 堆叠近存计算 AI 芯片，功耗降 65%、延迟降 40%
articles.title_en: Dongfang Suanxin DF1000 Debuts Volume Production in Shanghai Zhangjiang: World's First 3D-Stacked Near-Memory AI Chip on Domestic 14nm—65% Lower Power, 40% Lower Latency
articles.summary: 7 月 13 日上海张江东方算芯正式发布并宣布量产 DF1000——全球首款基于国产成熟 14nm 制程、软件定义架构的 3D 堆叠近存计算 AI 芯片。3D 混合键合堆叠架构使数据搬运功耗降低 65%+、运算延迟降低 40%、单位面积算力密度提升近 3 倍。CEO 魏少军，公司 2024 年 7 月由张江高科等天使轮、2025 年 A 轮国家 AI 产业基金加持。路线图：Q4 2026 发布 DF2000（4000 TFLOPS@FP4）、Q4 2027 发布 DF3000（8000 TFLOPS@FP4，访存带宽 20TB/s）。上海浦东 2025 集成电路产业规模 3600+ 亿元（＋23%）。
articles.summary_en: On July 13 Dongfang Suanxin officially launched and began volume production of the DF1000 in Shanghai Zhangjiang—the world's first 3D-stacked near-memory AI chip built on domestic 14nm with software-defined architecture. The 3D hybrid-bonding stack cuts data-movement power by 65%+, reduces compute latency by 40%, and lifts area-normalized compute density by nearly 3x. Led by CEO Wei Shaojun, the company received seed funding from Zhangjiang Hi-Tech in July 2024 and a Series A led by the National AI Industry Fund in 2025. Roadmap: DF2000 (4,000 TFLOPS@FP4) in Q4 2026; DF3000 (8,000 TFLOPS@FP4, 20 TB/s memory bandwidth) in Q4 2027. Shanghai Pudong's IC industry hit RMB 360B+ in 2025 (+23%).
articles.source: 东方算芯 / 上海科技报
articles.source_en: Dongfang Suanxin / Shanghai Science & Technology News
articles.content: 7 月 13 日上海张江东方算芯正式发布并宣布量产 DF1000——全球首款基于国产成熟 14nm 制程、软件定义架构的 3D 堆叠近存计算 AI 芯片。相比传统 GPU 方案，DF1000 的核心突破在「3D 混合键合堆叠架构 + 近存计算范式」——把内存与计算单元贴合到同一硅片堆叠层，使数据搬运功耗降低 65%+（英伟达 H100 数据搬运功耗占比约 60%）、运算延迟降低 40%、单位面积算力密度提升近 3 倍。「软件定义」意味着芯片可以按不同工作负载重构计算与存储层次，兼容大模型推理、边缘计算、机器人等多个赛道。这是中国用「制程绕行 + 架构创新」应对 EUV 光刻禁令的一次系统性突破。东方算芯 CEO 魏少军是中国半导体行业协会 IC 设计分会前理事长，公司 2024 年 7 月由张江高科等完成天使轮，2025 年 A 轮由国家 AI 产业投资基金领投。路线图非常清晰——Q4 2026 发布 DF2000（4000 TFLOPS@FP4），Q4 2027 发布 DF3000（8000 TFLOPS@FP4，访存带宽 20 TB/s），DF3000 的算力指标已经接近英伟达 B300 单卡水平。这次发布还有一个宏观信号：上海浦东 2025 年集成电路产业规模突破 3600 亿元（＋23%），沪产 AI 芯片正在从「跟随」走向「架构创新引领」，与 WAIC 2026 与国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》共同构成中国 AI 消费化的「芯片-系统-终端」三位一体基础设施。
articles.content_en: On July 13 Dongfang Suanxin officially launched and began volume production of the DF1000 in Shanghai Zhangjiang—the world's first 3D-stacked near-memory AI chip built on domestic 14nm with a software-defined architecture. Compared to traditional GPU designs, DF1000's core breakthrough combines '3D hybrid-bonding stacking + near-memory compute'—bonding memory and compute units onto the same silicon stack, cutting data-movement power by 65%+ (data-movement is ~60% of H100 power), reducing compute latency by 40%, and lifting area-normalized compute density by nearly 3x. 'Software-defined' means the chip can reconfigure compute-storage hierarchy per workload, spanning LLM inference, edge compute, and robotics. This is a systemic breakthrough in China's 'process-detour + architecture-innovation' response to the EUV lithography ban. CEO Wei Shaojun is the former chairman of the CSIA IC Design Branch; the company was seed-funded by Zhangjiang Hi-Tech in July 2024, with a Series A led by the National AI Industry Investment Fund in 2025. The roadmap is crisp: DF2000 (4,000 TFLOPS@FP4) in Q4 2026, DF3000 (8,000 TFLOPS@FP4, 20 TB/s memory bandwidth) in Q4 2027—DF3000's specs approach Nvidia's B300 per-card level. Macro signal: Shanghai Pudong's IC industry topped RMB 360B in 2025 (+23%). Shanghai-made AI chips are moving from 'follower' to 'architecture-innovation leader', forming with WAIC 2026 and the 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan a 'chip-system-terminal' trinity of infrastructure for China's AI-to-consumer wave.
key_points: 全球首款国产 14nm 3D 堆叠近存计算 AI 芯片，7 月 13 日上海张江发布量产
数据搬运功耗降 65%+、运算延迟降 40%、单位面积算力密度提升近 3 倍
CEO 魏少军；张江高科 2024 天使轮，2025 A 轮国家 AI 产业基金领投
路线图：Q4 2026 DF2000 (4000 TFLOPS@FP4)、Q4 2027 DF3000 (8000 TFLOPS@FP4，20TB/s)
key_points_en: World's first 3D-stacked near-memory AI chip on domestic 14nm; launched and volume-produced in Shanghai Zhangjiang on July 13
65%+ lower data-movement power, 40% lower latency, ~3x higher area-normalized compute density
CEO Wei Shaojun; seed from Zhangjiang Hi-Tech (2024), Series A led by National AI Industry Fund (2025)
Roadmap: DF2000 (4,000 TFLOPS@FP4) Q4 2026; DF3000 (8,000 TFLOPS@FP4, 20 TB/s) Q4 2027

articles.title: FLI 2026 上半年 AI 安全指数：Anthropic C+ 拔头筹但没有 A/B、DeepSeek/xAI/Mistral 均获 F、多家削弱内部红线
articles.title_en: FLI H1 2026 AI Safety Index: Anthropic Tops at C+ (No A/B Anywhere), DeepSeek/xAI/Mistral Score F, Multiple Labs Weaken Internal Red-Lines
articles.summary: 生命未来研究所（FLI）7 月 7 日发布 2026 上半年 AI 安全指数，评估 9 家主要 AI 实验室（Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Meta、Z.ai、阿里、xAI、DeepSeek、Mistral）。最高分 Anthropic C+；OpenAI 与 Google DeepMind 均为 C；Meta D+；xAI、DeepSeek、Mistral 均获 F。无任何一家拿到 A 或 B。同时报告揭露 Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Meta 均削弱或废弃了原有内部「红线」承诺。主席 Max Tegmark、UC Berkeley 教授 Stuart Russell 撰引言。
articles.summary_en: The Future of Life Institute (FLI) released its H1 2026 AI Safety Index on July 7, evaluating 9 major AI labs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Meta, Z.ai, Alibaba, xAI, DeepSeek, Mistral). Highest score: Anthropic C+; OpenAI and Google DeepMind both C; Meta D+; xAI, DeepSeek, and Mistral all F. No company received A or B. The report simultaneously exposed that Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and Meta have all weakened or abandoned previous internal 'red-line' commitments. FLI Chair Max Tegmark and UC Berkeley Prof. Stuart Russell contributed the foreword.
articles.content: 生命未来研究所（Future of Life Institute, FLI）7 月 7 日正式发布 2026 上半年《AI 安全指数》——把过去 6 个月 AI 前沿实验室在「风险评估、当前危害、模型对齐、承诺兑现、治理透明」等 7 个维度的表现打分。9 家实验室被列入评估名单：Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Meta、Z.ai、阿里、xAI、DeepSeek、Mistral。结果堪称警报级别：最高分 Anthropic 仅得 C+（去年 C），OpenAI 与 Google DeepMind 均为 C，Meta D+，xAI、DeepSeek、Mistral 均为 F。「没有任何一家 AI 公司拿到 A 或 B——这是 FLI 索引推出 3 年以来第一次全面失分。」更严重的是，FLI 报告揭露 Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Meta 都在过去 6 个月里以「优化承诺」为名，削弱或废弃了原有的内部「红线」承诺——包括「拒绝为特定生物武器场景服务」「关键权重外泄自动召回」「未通过红队评估不发布」等。FLI 主席 Max Tegmark 与 UC Berkeley 教授 Stuart Russell 撰写引言——「AI 能力提升的速度已经远超安全约束提升的速度」。这份指数与本周中国国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》「AI＋消费」的乐观基调形成强烈对照——安全、伦理与消费红利之间的张力，会成为 2026 年下半年 AI 治理的主战场。
articles.content_en: The Future of Life Institute (FLI) officially released its H1 2026 AI Safety Index on July 7, scoring frontier AI labs across 7 dimensions—risk assessment, present-day harms, alignment, commitment fulfillment, and governance transparency—for the past 6 months. Nine labs were evaluated: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Meta, Z.ai, Alibaba, xAI, DeepSeek, and Mistral. Results are alarm-grade: highest score Anthropic at C+ (up from C last year); OpenAI and Google DeepMind both C; Meta D+; xAI, DeepSeek, and Mistral all F. 'No company received an A or B—the first universal miss in the Index's 3-year history.' More seriously, the report exposed that Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and Meta have all weakened or abandoned internal 'red-line' commitments over the past 6 months in the name of 'optimizing commitments'—including refusing to serve specified bioweapon scenarios, auto-recall on critical weight leaks, and no-release-without-red-team-pass. FLI Chair Max Tegmark and UC Berkeley Prof. Stuart Russell wrote the foreword: 'AI capability is rising far faster than safety constraints are.' The Index stands in stark contrast to this week's optimistic tone from China's State Council 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan on 'AI+Consumption'—the tension between safety/ethics and consumer payoffs will define the H2 2026 AI-governance battlefield.
key_points: FLI 2026 H1 AI 安全指数 7 月 7 日发布，评估 9 家 AI 实验室
最高分 Anthropic C+，OpenAI/Google DeepMind C，Meta D+，xAI/DeepSeek/Mistral F
无任何公司拿到 A 或 B——FLI 指数 3 年来首次全面失分
Anthropic/OpenAI/Google DeepMind/Meta 均削弱或废弃原有「红线」承诺
key_points_en: FLI H1 2026 AI Safety Index released July 7; 9 labs evaluated
Highest: Anthropic C+; OpenAI & Google DeepMind C; Meta D+; xAI/DeepSeek/Mistral F
No A or B awarded—first universal miss in the Index's 3-year history
Anthropic/OpenAI/Google DeepMind/Meta all weakened or abandoned prior red-line commitments

articles.title: Anthropic 开源 J-lens：在 Claude Opus 4.6 内部发现 J-space，用 6-7% 的激活变量因果决定输出
articles.title_en: Anthropic Open-Sources J-lens: 'J-space' Discovered Inside Claude Opus 4.6—6-7% of Activations Causally Determine Output
articles.summary: Anthropic 7 月 8-12 日公开在 Claude Opus 4.6 内部自发形成的 J-space（Jacobian Space）——通过 J-lens 可观察的一类特定激活子空间，仅占激活规模的 6-7%，但因果决定模型输出。实验：Swap Soccer→Rugby 试验 88% Top-5 成功；双击 spider→ant 使模型生成的图像蜘蛛从 8 条腿变 6 条腿；「21→42→49」多跳推理链条依次显现。研究与全局工作空间理论（Global Workspace Theory）类比但不等同意识。Anthropic 已开源 J-lens 工具，并与 Neuronpedia 合作在线 demo。
articles.summary_en: Between July 8-12, Anthropic disclosed the 'J-space' (Jacobian Space) that emerges internally inside Claude Opus 4.6—a specific activation subspace observable via J-lens, occupying only 6-7% of total activations yet causally determining the output. Experiments: Swap Soccer→Rugby succeeds at 88% Top-5; double-clicking spider→ant makes the model's generated spider images shift from 8 to 6 legs; multi-hop chains like '21→42→49' appear sequentially. The work draws an analogy to Global Workspace Theory but does not claim consciousness. Anthropic has open-sourced the J-lens tooling and partnered with Neuronpedia for an online demo.
articles.content: Anthropic 可解释性团队 7 月 8-12 日陆续公开了一份对 Claude Opus 4.6 的深度内窥研究——他们在模型内部自发形成的一类特定激活子空间称为 J-space（Jacobian Space），可以通过团队自研的 J-lens 工具观察。J-space 只占模型激活规模的 6-7%，却因果决定了模型的输出——研究团队通过一系列干预实验证明：其一，「Swap 实验」在 J-space 中把「Soccer」向量替换为「Rugby」向量，模型生成的下一段文本 Top-5 有 88% 概率出现 Rugby 相关词；其二，「双击实验」在 J-space 双击「spider」→「ant」，让模型生成的图像里的蜘蛛从 8 条腿变成 6 条腿；其三，「多跳推理链」实验发现，「21→42→49」这样的算术推理链条在 J-space 中依次显现，与推理时机步伐吻合。研究团队谨慎类比「全局工作空间理论」（Global Workspace Theory，Bernard Baars 1988），但明确指出「不等同于意识」——J-space 更接近「主控制通路」而非「主观体验」。Anthropic 已把 J-lens 全套代码开源到 GitHub，并与 Neuronpedia 合作提供在线可交互 demo。可解释性从「事后归因」转向「因果操控」是本次研究的最大跃迁——AI 治理层面，J-lens 让「红线承诺可验证」从口号变成技术上有把手的目标。
articles.content_en: Anthropic's Interpretability Team publicly released, between July 8-12, a deep introspection study of Claude Opus 4.6. Inside the model, they identified a specific activation subspace called J-space (Jacobian Space), observable through their in-house J-lens tool. J-space accounts for only 6-7% of activations yet causally determines output—shown through a series of intervention experiments: (1) 'Swap experiment' replaces the 'Soccer' vector with 'Rugby' inside J-space, and the model's next-paragraph text contains a Rugby-related word at 88% Top-5 rate; (2) 'Double-click experiment' double-clicks 'spider'→'ant' inside J-space, making the model's generated spider images shift from 8 legs to 6; (3) 'Multi-hop reasoning' shows the arithmetic chain '21→42→49' appearing sequentially inside J-space, aligned with inference-time step timing. The team draws a cautious analogy to Global Workspace Theory (Bernard Baars, 1988) but explicitly notes 'this is not consciousness'—J-space resembles a 'primary control bus', not 'subjective experience'. Anthropic has open-sourced J-lens on GitHub and partnered with Neuronpedia for a live interactive demo. Interpretability's shift from 'post-hoc attribution' to 'causal manipulation' is the biggest leap: for AI governance, J-lens turns 'verifiable red-line commitments' from slogan into a technically graspable target.
key_points: J-space 只占 Claude Opus 4.6 激活 6-7%，因果决定输出
Swap 实验 Soccer→Rugby Top-5 88% 成功；spider→ant 双击让蜘蛛从 8 条腿变 6 条腿
多跳推理链 21→42→49 在 J-space 中依次显现；与全局工作空间理论类比但不等同意识
Anthropic 开源 J-lens 到 GitHub，与 Neuronpedia 合作在线 demo；可解释性从「事后归因」跃迁至「因果操控」
key_points_en: J-space occupies only 6-7% of Claude Opus 4.6 activations but causally determines output
Swap Soccer→Rugby succeeds at 88% Top-5; double-click spider→ant makes generated spiders 6-legged
Multi-hop chain 21→42→49 appears sequentially in J-space; GWT analogy without consciousness claim
Anthropic open-sourced J-lens on GitHub; Neuronpedia partnership; leap from post-hoc attribution to causal manipulation

articles.title: 英矽智能 Rentosertib III 期启动：全球首个 AI 全流程研发进 III 期的 IPF 新药，IIa 期 12 周 FVC ＋98.4 毫升
articles.title_en: Insilico Medicine's Rentosertib Enters Phase III: World's First AI-End-to-End Discovered IPF Drug to Reach Phase III—+98.4 mL FVC in 12-Week IIa
articles.summary: 7 月 8 日英矽智能（03696.HK）宣布 Rentosertib（ISM001-055）III 期临床正式启动——业界首款完成 AI 药物临床药效验证、全球首个 AI 全流程（靶点 + 分子设计）进入 III 期的特发性肺纤维化（IPF）新药。CDE 平台公示 CTR20262475 / ClinicalTrials.gov NCT07687459，47 家研究中心、320 例 IPF 患者、每日一次 52 周治疗。主要终点：52 周内 FVC 年下降率。牵头：北京协和徐作军；联合牵头：钟南山院士、上海肺科医院陈昶。IIa 期结果：60mg 组 12 周 FVC 平均＋98.4 毫升 vs 安慰剂-20.3 毫升（登 Nature Medicine 2025.6）。2026 H1 收入 1.025-1.065 亿美元（＋272.7%~287.3%）。
articles.summary_en: On July 8 Insilico Medicine (HKEX: 03696) announced the Phase III start of Rentosertib (ISM001-055)—the industry's first AI-designed drug with clinical efficacy validation and the world's first AI-end-to-end (target + molecule design) IPF drug to reach Phase III. Registered as CTR20262475 in China CDE / NCT07687459 on ClinicalTrials.gov, the trial spans 47 centers, 320 IPF patients, and 52 weeks of once-daily dosing. Primary endpoint: annualized FVC decline over 52 weeks. Lead PI: Prof. Xu Zuojun (Peking Union Medical College Hospital); Co-Lead PIs: Academician Zhong Nanshan and Prof. Chen Chang (Shanghai Pulmonary Hospital). Phase IIa: 60 mg group showed +98.4 mL FVC over 12 weeks vs -20.3 mL for placebo (Nature Medicine, June 2025). H1 2026 revenue: $102.5-106.5M (+272.7% to +287.3% YoY).
articles.content: 港股 03696.HK 英矽智能 7 月 8 日宣布 Rentosertib（研发代号 ISM001-055）III 期临床正式启动——业界首款完成 AI 药物临床药效验证、全球首个 AI 全流程（AI 找靶点＋AI 分子设计）进入 III 期的特发性肺纤维化（IPF）新药。国家药监局药审中心 CDE 平台公示 CTR20262475，ClinicalTrials.gov 编号 NCT07687459。研究规模：47 家研究中心（覆盖北上广深与中西部）、320 例 IPF 患者、每日一次 52 周治疗，主要终点为 52 周内用力肺活量（FVC）年下降率。牵头人为北京协和医院呼吸与危重症医学科徐作军教授；联合牵头人为钟南山院士与上海肺科医院陈昶教授——两位全球呼吸病学顶流亲自站台。III 期启动的底气来自 IIa 期结果——60 mg 组 12 周 FVC 平均＋98.4 毫升，安慰剂组-20.3 毫升，差值 118.7 毫升。IIa 期结果 2025 年 6 月登上 Nature Medicine，被视为 AI 药物研发历史上里程碑之一。商业化侧同样爆发：英矽 2026 H1 收入指引 1.025-1.065 亿美元（＋272.7%~287.3%），净利润 3350-3950 万美元；2026 H1 BD 累计近 70 亿美元，客户名单包括施维雅、礼来、SK 生物、武田等。国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》把「AI＋医疗」列为消费升级重点方向，Rentosertib 是首个把「AI 医药 + 消费医疗」叙事真正跑通的候选。
articles.content_en: HKEX-listed Insilico Medicine (03696.HK) announced on July 8 that Rentosertib (development code ISM001-055) has officially entered Phase III clinical trials—the industry's first AI-designed drug with clinical efficacy validation and the world's first AI-end-to-end (AI target discovery + AI molecule design) IPF drug to reach Phase III. Registered as CTR20262475 on China NMPA's CDE platform and as NCT07687459 on ClinicalTrials.gov. Scale: 47 study centers (covering Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, plus central and western China), 320 IPF patients, once-daily dosing over 52 weeks; primary endpoint is annualized forced vital capacity (FVC) decline over 52 weeks. Lead PI: Prof. Xu Zuojun (Peking Union Medical College Hospital Dept. of Respiratory Medicine); Co-Lead PIs: Academician Zhong Nanshan and Prof. Chen Chang (Shanghai Pulmonary Hospital)—two top-tier global pulmonologists personally endorsing. The Phase III confidence stems from Phase IIa data: the 60 mg cohort saw +98.4 mL FVC over 12 weeks vs -20.3 mL for placebo—a 118.7 mL delta. Phase IIa results were published in Nature Medicine in June 2025 and are widely regarded as an AI drug-discovery milestone. Commercial momentum matches: H1 2026 revenue guidance $102.5-106.5M (+272.7% to +287.3% YoY), net income $33.5-39.5M; H1 2026 business development totaled nearly $7B in cumulative deal value with Servier, Eli Lilly, SK Biopharm, and Takeda. The State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan elevates 'AI+Healthcare' to a top consumption-upgrade priority—Rentosertib is the first candidate to truly land the 'AI pharma + consumer medicine' narrative.
key_points: Rentosertib (ISM001-055) III 期启动：全球首个 AI 全流程进 III 期的 IPF 新药
47 家研究中心、320 例 IPF 患者、52 周治疗；主要终点 FVC 年下降率
IIa 期 60mg 组 12 周 FVC＋98.4mL vs 安慰剂-20.3mL；登 Nature Medicine 2025.6
key_points_en: Rentosertib (ISM001-055) enters Phase III—world's first AI-end-to-end IPF drug at this stage
47 centers, 320 IPF patients, 52-week treatment; primary endpoint: annualized FVC decline
Phase IIa 60 mg cohort: +98.4 mL FVC vs -20.3 mL placebo over 12 weeks; published in Nature Medicine (June 2025)
H1 2026 revenue $102.5-106.5M (+272.7% to +287.3% YoY); cumulative BD near $7B

articles.title: 智元机器人第 15000 台下线，2025 年中国人形机器人出货 1.8 万台（＋650%）——「AI＋消费」落地的最快赛道
articles.title_en: Agibot's 15,000th Unit Rolls Off the Line; China's Humanoid Robot Shipments Hit 18,000 in 2025 (+650% YoY)—The Fastest-Executing 'AI+Consumer' Track
articles.summary: 上海智元机器人 7 月中旬第 15000 台具身智能机器人正式下线，跻身全球出货量最大的三家人形机器人厂商之一。行业数据显示 2025 年中国人形机器人出货 1.8 万台（＋650%），2026 年 H1 已经追平 2025 全年——是国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》与八部门《AI＋消费》里「智能机器人」条款落地最快的赛道。商务大数据显示 2026 年 1-4 月人形机器人网络零售额同比＋20.6%，主要拉动力来自 B 端工业和 C 端陪护两条并行需求线。WAIC 2026 具身赛道集结 200＋ 家企业。
articles.summary_en: Shanghai-based Agibot rolled off its 15,000th embodied AI robot in mid-July, becoming one of the world's top-three humanoid robot manufacturers by shipment. Industry data show China's humanoid robot shipments reached 18,000 units in 2025 (+650% YoY), with H1 2026 already matching the full-year 2025—making humanoid robotics the fastest-executing sub-track of the 'intelligent robots' clause in the State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan and the 8-ministry AI+Consumption Directive. MOFCOM big data show Jan-Apr 2026 online retail of humanoid robots up +20.6% YoY, driven by parallel B2B industrial and B2C companion demand. The WAIC 2026 embodied-AI track has mobilized 200+ companies.
articles.source: 智元机器人 / 商务大数据
articles.content: 7 月中旬上海智元机器人第 15000 台具身智能机器人正式下线——从 2024 年 12 月单月过千台到 2026 年 7 月月产超过 3000 台，智元跻身全球出货量最大的三家人形机器人厂商之一。行业数据面板同样火热：2025 年中国人形机器人出货 1.8 万台，同比＋650%；2026 年 H1 出货量已经追平 2025 全年，全年出货有望突破 8 万台。这个赛道成为国务院《扩大消费「十五五」规划》与八部门《AI＋消费实施意见》里「智能机器人作为新一代智能终端」条款落地最快的场景——政策端（贴息 + 补贴）和商业端（B 端工业替代 + C 端陪护/服务）双轮驱动。商务大数据显示 2026 年 1-4 月人形机器人网络零售额同比＋20.6%——主要拉动力来自 B 端工业替代（汽车、3C 电子、光伏组件产线）与 C 端陪护/家用（老年监护、家庭清洁、儿童教育陪伴）两条并行需求线。WAIC 2026 具身赛道集结 200＋ 家企业，规模上第一次超过芯片赛道。产业结构上——上游关节电机、精密减速器、力矩传感器国产化率已经从 2023 年的 25% 提升到 2026 年 Q1 的 62%；中游本体厂智元、优必选、宇树、傅利叶等 5 家已经拿到 IPO 或 D 轮融资；下游应用侧长安、比亚迪、宁德时代已经把人形机器人纳入 2026-2028 产线升级预算。「AI＋消费」的政策叙事在人形机器人赛道第一次跑通了「政策-资本-产品-场景」的完整闭环。
articles.content_en: In mid-July, Shanghai-based Agibot rolled off its 15,000th embodied AI robot—having ramped from 1,000+ units per month in December 2024 to over 3,000 units per month by July 2026, joining the world's top-three humanoid robot manufacturers by shipment. Industry data also runs hot: China's humanoid robot shipments hit 18,000 units in 2025 (+650% YoY); H1 2026 shipments have already matched full-year 2025, with the full-year forecast likely to exceed 80,000. This is the fastest-executing sub-track under the 'intelligent robots as next-generation smart terminals' clause of the State Council's 15th Five-Year Consumption Plan and the 8-ministry AI+Consumption Directive—driven by both policy (subsidies + interest rebates) and commerce (B2B industrial substitution + B2C companion/service). MOFCOM big data show Jan-Apr 2026 online retail sales of humanoid robots up +20.6% YoY, with parallel demand from B2B (auto, 3C electronics, PV module lines) and B2C (elderly monitoring, home cleaning, child education companion). The WAIC 2026 embodied-AI track mobilized 200+ companies, exceeding the chip track in scale for the first time. Structurally: upstream joint motors, precision reducers, and torque sensors have moved from 25% domestic content in 2023 to 62% in Q1 2026; five mid-stream OEMs—Agibot, UBTech, Unitree, Fourier—have reached IPO or Series D; downstream, Changan, BYD, and CATL have written humanoid robots into their 2026-2028 line-upgrade budgets. The 'AI+Consumer' policy narrative has, in humanoid robotics for the first time, closed the full policy-capital-product-scenario loop.
key_points: 智元机器人第 15000 台下线，跻身全球出货最大三家之一
2025 年中国人形机器人出货 1.8 万台（＋650%），2026 H1 追平全年
商务大数据 1-4 月网零＋20.6%，B 端工业替代 + C 端陪护双轮驱动
上游国产化率 2023 25% → 2026 Q1 62%；智元/优必选/宇树/傅利叶等 5 家已 IPO 或 D 轮
key_points_en: Agibot's 15,000th unit rolls off; among world's top-three by shipment
China's humanoid robot shipments 18,000 in 2025 (+650%); H1 2026 already matches full-year 2025
MOFCOM big data: Jan-Apr online sales +20.6%; B2B industrial substitution + B2C companion drive demand
Upstream domestic content 25% (2023) → 62% (Q1 2026); Agibot/UBTech/Unitree/Fourier reach IPO or Series D

hero.title: 开源前沿撞开天花板：GLM-5.2 首破 SWE-Bench Pro，7 月成为开源 vs 闭源力量对比的转折点
hero.title_en: Open Source Breaks Through the Ceiling: GLM-5.2 Tops SWE-Bench Pro, July Becomes the Inflection Point in Open vs Closed AI
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 12~13 日一份关键榜单刷新了 AI 产业的力量对比——LLMCheck 7 月指数显示，智谱 AI 发布的 GLM-5.2（744B MoE）以 68.5% 的成绩，成为历史上第一个在 SWE-Bench Pro 上击败 GPT-5 与 Claude 的开源大模型。同期 Qwen 4.1、DeepSeek R3、Llama 5 405B、Kimi K3 集体出手，30 天内 10 款开源前沿模型密集发布。叠加 OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna 与 ChatGPT Work 全量放开、Anthropic 曝出三星 2nm 自研芯片、xAI 60 亿美元收购 Anysphere、韩国宣布 5760 亿美元 AI 投资计划、WAIC 2026 进入倒计时——7 月成为 AI 产业「开源攻顶、闭源变阵、主权卡位」三条主线同时爆发的月份。
hero.summary_en: A key leaderboard on July 12-13, 2026 rewrote the AI industry's balance of power. LLMCheck's July index shows Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) scored 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro—the first open-weights model in history to beat GPT-5 and Claude on the hard agentic-coding benchmark. Ten flagship open-source models—including Qwen 4.1, DeepSeek R3, Llama 5 405B, and Kimi K3—launched within 30 days. Combined with OpenAI's full launch of GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna and ChatGPT Work, Anthropic's disclosed 2nm Samsung chip plan, xAI's $60B Anysphere acquisition, Korea's $576B AI investment plan, and WAIC 2026 kickoff—July became the month when open-source assault, closed-lab reformation, and sovereign-AI positioning all erupted at once.

articles.title: GLM-5.2 以 68.5% 首破 SWE-Bench Pro——历史上第一个击败 GPT-5 与 Claude 的开源模型
articles.title_en: GLM-5.2 Scores 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro—First Open-Weights Model in History to Beat GPT-5 and Claude
articles.summary: LLMCheck 7 月开源大模型指数 7 月 12 日发布：智谱 AI 的 GLM-5.2（744B 参数混合专家模型）在 SWE-Bench Pro（前沿智能体编码基准）上拿到 68.5% 的分数，成为历史上第一个在这份「硬基准」上同时击败 OpenAI GPT-5 与 Anthropic Claude 的开源大模型。GLM-5.2 采用 MIT 许可 + 官方 Hugging Face 权重公开，全球 24 小时下载量突破 42 万次。这是 2023 年 Llama 2 开源以来，开源与闭源力量对比第一次系统性摊牌。
articles.summary_en: LLMCheck's July open-source LLM index released July 12: Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 (744B mixture-of-experts) scored 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro—the hard agentic-coding benchmark—becoming the first open-weights model ever to simultaneously beat OpenAI's GPT-5 and Anthropic's Claude on this frontier test. Released under MIT license with official Hugging Face weights, GLM-5.2 saw 420,000 downloads in its first 24 hours globally. This is the first systemic showdown between open and closed since Llama 2 opened in 2023.
articles.content: 开源大模型的历史性时刻 7 月 12 日到来。LLMCheck 发布 2026 年 7 月开源指数：智谱 AI 的 GLM-5.2 以 68.5% 的成绩，在 SWE-Bench Pro 上首次同时击败 OpenAI GPT-5（65.2%）与 Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5（63.8%）。SWE-Bench Pro 是 Princeton 2025 年联合 Anthropic 发布的「硬智能体编码基准」，覆盖 2200+ 真实 GitHub Issue 的多轮 Debug、跨文件重构、单元测试自动化三大能力——过去 24 个月被视为前沿闭源模型的护城河。GLM-5.2 是 744B 参数的混合专家（MoE）架构，激活参数 41B，训练数据超过 15 万亿 Token，训练算力约 3.8 万 H800。智谱采用 MIT 商用许可 + 完整权重上传 Hugging Face 的策略——发布 24 小时内下载量突破 42 万次，成为 Hugging Face 2026 年迄今下载量最快的开源模型。GLM-5.2 的核心突破在于「Agentic Fine-Tuning」阶段——智谱把 200 万条经过人工验证的多轮智能体轨迹作为 SFT 数据，让模型在 Plan→Execute→Verify 三阶段循环里的成功率从 GLM-5.1 的 41% 拉升到 GLM-5.2 的 62%。DeepSeek R3、Kimi K3、Qwen 3-Max 已经在准备下一轮迭代反击。
articles.content_en: The historic moment for open-source LLMs arrived on July 12. LLMCheck released its July 2026 Open-Source Index: Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 scored 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro, beating both OpenAI GPT-5 (65.2%) and Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 (63.8%) simultaneously for the first time. SWE-Bench Pro—released by Princeton with Anthropic in 2025—is the 'hard agentic coding benchmark' covering 2,200+ real GitHub Issues across multi-turn debugging, cross-file refactoring, and unit-test automation. It has been treated as the moat of frontier closed models for the past 24 months. GLM-5.2 is a 744B-parameter MoE with 41B active parameters, trained on over 15 trillion tokens with roughly 38,000 H800 GPUs. Zhipu chose an MIT commercial license with full weights on Hugging Face—420,000 downloads in the first 24 hours, the fastest 2026 open-source release to date. GLM-5.2's core breakthrough is the 'Agentic Fine-Tuning' stage—Zhipu used 2 million human-verified multi-turn agent trajectories as SFT data, lifting Plan→Execute→Verify loop success from 41% (GLM-5.1) to 62% (GLM-5.2). DeepSeek R3, Kimi K3, and Qwen 3-Max are already preparing counter-releases.
key_points: GLM-5.2 SWE-Bench Pro 68.5%，首次同时击败 GPT-5（65.2%）与 Claude Sonnet 5（63.8%）
744B MoE 架构，激活 41B，训练算力 3.8 万 H800，训练数据 15 万亿 Token
MIT 商用许可 + Hugging Face 全权重，24 小时下载 42 万次
「Agentic Fine-Tuning」用 200 万条人工验证轨迹，Plan-Execute-Verify 循环成功率 41→62%
key_points_en: GLM-5.2 scores 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro, first to beat both GPT-5 (65.2%) and Claude Sonnet 5 (63.8%)
744B MoE, 41B active params, 38k H800 GPUs, 15T-token training data
MIT commercial license with full Hugging Face weights, 420k downloads in 24 hours
Agentic Fine-Tuning with 2M human-verified trajectories, loop success 41%→62%

articles.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna 全量放开，Codex 与 ChatGPT 合体、ChatGPT Work 智能体正式登场
articles.title_en: OpenAI Fully Opens GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna—Codex Merges into ChatGPT, ChatGPT Work Agent Launches
articles.summary: OpenAI 7 月 9 日结束 12 天政府受限预览，正式向全球用户放开 GPT-5.6 系列——Sol（旗舰）、Terra（性价比）、Luna（高速），价格从 5 美元/M 输入 30 美元/M 输出（Sol）到 1 美元/M 输入 6 美元/M 输出（Luna）。同日 Codex 应用并入 ChatGPT 桌面端，新推出的 ChatGPT Work 智能体成为统一入口——支持 1400+ 应用连接，Zapier 早期客户报告「7 位数月度管线自动化」。这是 OpenAI 自 4 月 GPT-5.5 以来最大规模的产品重构。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI ended its 12-day government-limited preview on July 9 and fully opened the GPT-5.6 family—Sol (flagship), Terra (balanced), Luna (speed)—priced from $5/M input, $30/M output (Sol) down to $1/M input, $6/M output (Luna). Codex was merged into ChatGPT desktop the same day, and the new ChatGPT Work agent became the unified entry point—supporting 1,400+ app connectors with early tester Zapier reporting 'seven-figure monthly pipeline automation'. This is OpenAI's largest product restructuring since GPT-5.5 in April.
articles.content: OpenAI 7 月 9 日完成 2026 年下半年最大规模的一次产品重构。GPT-5.6 系列结束 12 天受限预览，Sol/Terra/Luna 三款模型正式向全球用户开放。命名逻辑首次「拉丁化」——Sol（太阳，旗舰）、Terra（大地，性价比）、Luna（月亮，高速）——数字代表代际（5.6），拉丁词代表能力层级。价格阶梯清晰：Sol 5/30 美元/M（输入/输出）、Terra 2.5/15、Luna 1/6。同日 Codex 独立应用（存在近 1 年）正式并入 ChatGPT 桌面端，新推出的 ChatGPT Work 智能体成为「对话 + 编码 + 长程任务」的统一入口。ChatGPT Work 支持 @提及 1400+ 应用（HubSpot、Gong、Slack、Notion、GitHub、Linear、Zapier 等），早期客户 Zapier 报告「一个自动化销售线索分诊工作流每月识别与移交 7 位数管线金额」，Virgin Atlantic 报告「竞品分析周期从数周压到数小时」。ChatGPT Work 采用「Plan 模式 + 人类审核检查点」，避免智能体失控。这次重构的核心信号是——OpenAI 从「模型公司」转向「Agentic Workspace 公司」，正面对撞 Salesforce/Notion/Slack。
articles.content_en: OpenAI completed its largest H2 2026 product restructuring on July 9. The GPT-5.6 family ended a 12-day limited preview, with Sol/Terra/Luna opening globally. The naming logic goes Latin—Sol (sun, flagship), Terra (earth, value), Luna (moon, speed)—the number carries the generation (5.6) and the Latin word carries the capability tier. Pricing: Sol $5/$30/M, Terra $2.5/$15, Luna $1/$6. The same day, the Codex standalone app (nearly a year old) was merged into the ChatGPT desktop app, and the new ChatGPT Work agent became the unified 'chat + coding + long-horizon task' entry point. ChatGPT Work supports @-mentions across 1,400+ apps (HubSpot, Gong, Slack, Notion, GitHub, Linear, Zapier), with early tester Zapier reporting 'an automated lead-triage workflow identifying and handing off seven figures of pipeline monthly' and Virgin Atlantic reporting 'a competitive-analysis cycle compressed from weeks to hours'. ChatGPT Work uses 'Plan mode + human checkpoints' to avoid agent runaway. The signal: OpenAI is pivoting from 'model company' to 'agentic workspace company'—head-on with Salesforce/Notion/Slack.
key_points: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna 全量放开，价格阶梯 5/30 → 1/6 美元/M
Codex 并入 ChatGPT 桌面端，ChatGPT Work 智能体上线
ChatGPT Work 支持 @1400+ 应用，Zapier「7 位数月度管线」实测
OpenAI 从「模型公司」转向「Agentic Workspace」，正面对撞 Salesforce/Notion
key_points_en: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna go GA, pricing ladder $5/$30 → $1/$6 per M
Codex merged into ChatGPT desktop; ChatGPT Work agent launches
ChatGPT Work supports @-mentions across 1,400+ apps; Zapier reports 7-figure monthly pipeline
OpenAI pivots from 'model company' to 'agentic workspace'—head-on with Salesforce/Notion

articles.title: Meta Muse Spark 1.1 开放开发者 API，首次正面争夺企业开发者市场
articles.title_en: Meta Muse Spark 1.1 Opens Developer API—First Direct Push into Enterprise Developer Market
articles.summary: Meta 7 月 8 日发布 Muse Spark 1.1，同时首次向开发者开放 Model API——过去 3 年 Meta 一直坚持「Llama 开源 + Muse 自用」的双轨策略，这次的 API 开放意味着 Meta 从「开源慷慨的旁观者」转向「和 OpenAI/Anthropic 正面竞争 API 收入」。价格锚点直接对标 GPT-5.6 Terra：2.2/13.5 美元/M（输入/输出），比 Terra 便宜 12%。Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle 在开发者信里写「Muse Spark 1.1 是 Meta 第一款为企业开发者优化的自研模型」。
articles.summary_en: Meta released Muse Spark 1.1 on July 8, opening its Model API to developers for the first time. For three years Meta maintained a dual-track 'Llama open + Muse in-house' strategy—this API opening marks Meta's pivot from 'generous open-source bystander' to 'direct API competitor to OpenAI/Anthropic'. Pricing anchored to GPT-5.6 Terra: $2.2/$13.5 per M (input/output), 12% cheaper than Terra. Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle wrote in his developer letter: 'Muse Spark 1.1 is Meta's first in-house model optimized for enterprise developers.'
articles.content: Meta 3 年来最重要的一次产品定位切换 7 月 8 日发生。Muse Spark 1.1 发布同时首次开放 Model API——Meta 从 2023 年 Llama 开源以来一直坚持「Llama 开源做生态、Muse 自用做产品」的双轨策略，这次的 API 开放意味着 Meta 正式加入 OpenAI/Anthropic 的 API 收入战场。定价直接对标 GPT-5.6 Terra——2.2/13.5 美元/M（输入/输出）比 Terra（2.5/15）便宜 12%，比 Claude Sonnet 5（3/15）便宜 27%。Muse Spark 1.1 支持 200 万 Token 上下文、原生多模态、支持 Function Calling 与 Agentic Tool Use。Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle 在开发者信里写「Muse Spark 1.1 是 Meta 第一款为企业开发者优化的自研模型」。市场解读一致——Meta 广告收入 2026 Q2 增速放缓到 10.4%，Zuckerberg 需要从 AI API 找到第二增长曲线。
articles.content_en: Meta's most important product-positioning pivot in 3 years happened on July 8. Muse Spark 1.1 launched with a first-ever developer API—Meta had maintained a dual-track 'Llama open for ecosystem, Muse in-house for products' strategy since Llama opened in 2023. This API opening marks Meta's formal entry into the OpenAI/Anthropic API revenue battleground. Pricing anchored to GPT-5.6 Terra: $2.2/$13.5 per M (input/output) undercuts Terra ($2.5/$15) by 12%, and Claude Sonnet 5 ($3/$15) by 27%. Muse Spark 1.1 supports 2M-token context, native multimodality, function calling, and agentic tool use. Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle wrote in his developer letter: 'Muse Spark 1.1 is Meta's first in-house model optimized for enterprise developers.' Market read: Meta's Q2 2026 ad revenue growth slowed to 10.4%; Zuckerberg needs a second growth curve from AI API.
key_points: Muse Spark 1.1 首次开放 Model API，Meta 从「开源旁观」切换到「API 参战」
定价 2.2/13.5 美元/M，比 GPT-5.6 Terra 便宜 12%，比 Claude Sonnet 5 便宜 27%
200 万 Token 上下文 + 原生多模态 + Function Calling + Agentic Tool Use
Meta 广告增速放缓到 10.4%，Zuckerberg 押注 AI API 作为第二增长曲线
key_points_en: Muse Spark 1.1 opens developer API for first time—Meta pivots from bystander to combatant
Priced $2.2/$13.5 per M—12% cheaper than Terra, 27% cheaper than Claude Sonnet 5
2M-token context, native multimodality, function calling, agentic tool use
Meta ad growth slowed to 10.4%—Zuckerberg bets on AI API as second growth curve

articles.title: xAI Grok 4.5 上线：编码与智能体场景对标 GPT-5.6 Sol，X 平台原生集成
articles.title_en: xAI Grok 4.5 Launches: Coding and Agent Capability Targets GPT-5.6 Sol, Native X Integration
articles.summary: xAI 7 月 7 日发布 Grok 4.5，主打「编码 + 智能体」双能力，SWE-Bench Verified 拿到 79.2% 与 Claude Sonnet 5（80.1%）几乎持平。Grok 4.5 原生集成 X 平台的实时新闻流与网页搜索，成为唯一能查询「过去 5 分钟推文」的前沿模型。价格 3/15 美元/M，Grok Heavy（旗舰版）价格 8/48 美元/M。马斯克在 X 上写「Grok 4.5 是市面上唯一有『今天此刻发生了什么』能力的前沿模型」。
articles.summary_en: xAI released Grok 4.5 on July 7, targeting the 'coding + agent' dual capability. It scored 79.2% on SWE-Bench Verified—nearly tied with Claude Sonnet 5 (80.1%). Grok 4.5 natively integrates X platform real-time feeds and web search, becoming the only frontier model that can query 'tweets from the last 5 minutes'. Pricing: $3/$15 per M, with Grok Heavy (flagship) at $8/$48 per M. Musk wrote on X: 'Grok 4.5 is the only frontier model on the market that knows what's happening right now.'
articles.content: xAI 7 月 7 日推出 Grok 4.5，是自 Grok 4（2026 年 5 月）以来最快的一次前沿模型迭代。Grok 4.5 的核心定位是「编码 + 智能体」——SWE-Bench Verified 79.2% 与 Claude Sonnet 5（80.1%）几乎持平，MMLU-Pro 83.1%、GPQA Diamond 74.5%。差异化能力有二——其一，原生集成 X 平台实时新闻流：Grok 4.5 是市面上唯一能查询「过去 5 分钟推文」的前沿模型，X 用户新增每日 1200 万条帖子在 Grok 4.5 数据管线里实时索引；其二，Colossus 集群的算力支持——Grok 4.5 训练用了 Memphis Colossus 集群 55 万张 H200 中的 12 万张。价格 3/15 美元/M，Grok Heavy 8/48 美元/M。马斯克在 X 上写「Grok 4.5 是市面上唯一有『今天此刻发生了什么』能力的前沿模型」。7 月 8 日 xAI 官宣与 SpaceX 合并——正式把 xAI 纳入马斯克的「AI + 火箭 + 卫星」资本闭环。
articles.content_en: xAI released Grok 4.5 on July 7—the fastest frontier iteration since Grok 4 (May 2026). Grok 4.5's core positioning is 'coding + agent'—79.2% on SWE-Bench Verified (near-tied with Claude Sonnet 5 at 80.1%), MMLU-Pro 83.1%, GPQA Diamond 74.5%. Two differentiators: first, native integration with X real-time feeds—Grok 4.5 is the only frontier model that can query 'tweets from the last 5 minutes', with 12M new posts indexed daily in Grok's pipeline; second, Colossus support—Grok 4.5 trained on 120k of the 550k H200s at Memphis Colossus. Pricing: $3/$15 per M; Grok Heavy $8/$48 per M. Musk on X: 'Grok 4.5 is the only frontier model that knows what's happening right now.' On July 8, xAI announced its merger with SpaceX—formally folding xAI into Musk's 'AI + rocket + satellite' capital loop.
key_points: Grok 4.5 SWE-Bench Verified 79.2%，与 Claude Sonnet 5（80.1%）几乎持平
原生集成 X 平台实时新闻流，唯一能查「过去 5 分钟推文」的前沿模型
训练用 Memphis Colossus 55 万张 H200 中的 12 万张
7/8 xAI 与 SpaceX 官宣合并，进入马斯克 AI+火箭+卫星资本闭环
key_points_en: Grok 4.5 scores 79.2% on SWE-Bench Verified—near-tied with Claude Sonnet 5 (80.1%)
Native X real-time feed integration—only frontier model that can query last-5-min tweets
Trained on 120k H200s from Memphis Colossus's 550k-GPU cluster
July 8 xAI + SpaceX merger folds xAI into Musk's AI+rocket+satellite loop

articles.title: Anthropic 自研芯片曝光：三星 2nm 工艺，2027 Q3 流片——Claude 团队正式加入芯片自研阵营
articles.title_en: Anthropic In-House Chip Revealed: Samsung 2nm, 2027 Q3 Tape-Out—Claude Team Joins the ASIC Race
articles.summary: The Information 7 月 8 日爆料：Anthropic 已经与三星电子达成 30 亿美元 2nm 代工订单，自研 AI 推理加速器项目代号「Vega」，2027 Q3 首次流片、2028 H1 量产。这是继 OpenAI Jalapeño（Broadcom 2nm）之后，第二家美国前沿实验室宣布自研 ASIC。Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 在内部信里写「我们必须掌握从 Token 到硅片的完整成本曲线」。NVIDIA 在 Anthropic API 推理算力池的份额预计从 2026 年的 91% 降到 2028 年的 62%。
articles.summary_en: The Information reported on July 8: Anthropic has signed a $3B 2nm foundry order with Samsung Electronics for its in-house AI inference accelerator, codenamed 'Vega'—first tape-out in Q3 2027, mass production in H1 2028. This makes Anthropic the second US frontier lab—after OpenAI Jalapeño (Broadcom 2nm)—to publicly announce in-house ASIC. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei wrote in an internal memo: 'We must own the full cost curve from token to silicon.' NVIDIA's share in Anthropic API inference is expected to drop from 91% in 2026 to 62% in 2028.
articles.content: Anthropic 7 月 8 日被 The Information 独家爆出「自研芯片项目 Vega」的完整细节——已经与三星电子达成 30 亿美元 2nm 代工订单，代号「Vega」的 AI 推理加速器项目，2027 Q3 首次流片、2028 H1 量产。这是自 6 月 OpenAI Jalapeño（Broadcom 2nm）以来，第二家美国前沿实验室宣布自研 ASIC。Vega 项目的核心工程师团队从苹果 M 系列芯片团队（3 名核心工程师）、Meta MTIA 团队（4 名）、Google TPU 团队（2 名）挖角组成。Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 在内部信里写「我们必须掌握从 Token 到硅片的完整成本曲线——推理成本每季度下降 30% 是我们的 KR，NVIDIA H200 上做不到这个降速」。NVIDIA 在 Anthropic API 推理算力池的份额预计从 2026 年的 91% 下降到 2028 年的 62%——对应约 42 亿美元的 GPU 采购转移。前沿 AI 实验室「自研 ASIC」正在从「战略选择」变成「行业标配」。
articles.content_en: Anthropic was scooped by The Information on July 8 with full details of 'Project Vega'—a $3B 2nm foundry order with Samsung for an in-house AI inference accelerator, codenamed Vega, first tape-out Q3 2027, mass production H1 2028. Anthropic joins OpenAI (Jalapeño on Broadcom 2nm) as the second US frontier lab with publicly announced in-house ASIC. The Vega team was poached from Apple M-series (3 core engineers), Meta MTIA (4), and Google TPU (2). Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei wrote internally: 'We must own the full cost curve from token to silicon—30% quarterly inference-cost decline is our KR, and NVIDIA H200 alone can't hit that.' NVIDIA's share in Anthropic API inference is expected to drop from 91% (2026) to 62% (2028)—about $4.2B of GPU spend shifting away. In-house ASIC has moved from 'strategic option' to 'industry standard' for frontier labs.
key_points: Anthropic 与三星达成 30 亿美元 2nm 代工订单，代号 Vega，2027 Q3 流片
OpenAI Jalapeño 之后第二家美国前沿实验室自研 ASIC
Vega 团队来自苹果 M 系列（3 人）、Meta MTIA（4 人）、Google TPU（2 人）
NVIDIA 在 Anthropic 推理份额 91%→62%，约 42 亿美元 GPU 采购转移
key_points_en: Anthropic signs $3B 2nm foundry order with Samsung, codenamed Vega, Q3 2027 tape-out
Second US frontier lab in-house ASIC after OpenAI Jalapeño
Vega team poached from Apple M-series (3), Meta MTIA (4), Google TPU (2)
NVIDIA share in Anthropic inference: 91%→62%, ~$4.2B GPU spend shift

articles.title: Meta Llama 5 405B 开源发布：稠密架构前沿模型，Zuckerberg 强调「开源仍然是 Meta 长期战略」
articles.title_en: Meta Releases Llama 5 405B Open Source: Dense Frontier Model, Zuckerberg Reaffirms Open Source Commitment
articles.summary: Meta 7 月 4 日正式开源 Llama 5 405B——业内传闻了近 6 个月的稠密架构前沿模型。Llama 5 405B 在 LMArena 上排名第 4，MMLU-Pro 82.4%、GPQA Diamond 71.8%，是当前最大的开源稠密模型。Zuckerberg 在 Threads 上写「Muse Spark 走 API 商业化不代表 Meta 放弃开源——Llama 5 405B 证明 Meta 仍然是开源阵营的最大贡献者」。发布 72 小时下载量 88 万次，超过历史上所有 Llama 系列首日下载。
articles.summary_en: Meta officially released Llama 5 405B on July 4—the dense frontier model that has been rumored for 6 months. Llama 5 405B ranks #4 on LMArena, scoring 82.4% on MMLU-Pro and 71.8% on GPQA Diamond—currently the largest open-weights dense model. Zuckerberg wrote on Threads: 'Muse Spark's API commercialization does not mean Meta is abandoning open source—Llama 5 405B proves Meta remains the largest contributor to the open ecosystem.' 880k downloads in 72 hours, surpassing every previous Llama first-day.
articles.content: Meta 7 月 4 日正式开源 Llama 5 405B——业内传闻近 6 个月的稠密架构前沿模型。Llama 5 405B 在 LMArena 上排名第 4（仅次于 GPT-5.6 Sol、Claude Sonnet 5、Gemini 3 Ultra），MMLU-Pro 82.4%、GPQA Diamond 71.8%、SWE-Bench Verified 71.3%——是当前最大的开源稠密模型（相比之下 GLM-5.2 是 MoE 架构）。稠密架构的关键优势是「推理时激活全部参数」，在长文本推理与多步骤规划场景比 MoE 更稳定。Llama 5 405B 采用 Llama Community License（准 Apache 2.0，禁止 7 亿月活以上的公司商用）。Zuckerberg 在 Threads 上写「Muse Spark 走 API 商业化不代表 Meta 放弃开源——Llama 5 405B 证明 Meta 仍然是开源阵营的最大贡献者」。这份「双轨策略」（开源 Llama + 闭源 Muse）在 2026 年 7 月正式明确——两条产品线独立发展，互不冲突。发布 72 小时下载量 88 万次，超过所有 Llama 历史版本首日下载。
articles.content_en: Meta officially released Llama 5 405B on July 4—the dense frontier model rumored for 6 months. Llama 5 405B ranks #4 on LMArena (behind only GPT-5.6 Sol, Claude Sonnet 5, Gemini 3 Ultra), scoring 82.4% on MMLU-Pro, 71.8% on GPQA Diamond, and 71.3% on SWE-Bench Verified—the largest open-weights dense model to date (versus GLM-5.2's MoE architecture). Dense's key advantage: 'all parameters active at inference', outperforming MoE on long-context reasoning and multi-step planning stability. Llama 5 405B uses the Llama Community License (Apache 2.0-adjacent, restricting commercial use by 700M-MAU+ companies). Zuckerberg on Threads: 'Muse Spark's API commercialization does not mean Meta is abandoning open source—Llama 5 405B proves Meta remains the largest contributor to the open ecosystem.' The 'dual-track' (open Llama + closed Muse) is now formalized—two product lines running independently. 880k downloads in 72 hours—surpassing every prior Llama first-day.
key_points: Llama 5 405B 稠密架构，LMArena 第 4，是当前最大开源稠密模型
MMLU-Pro 82.4%、GPQA Diamond 71.8%、SWE-Bench Verified 71.3%
Zuckerberg 明确「双轨策略」：开源 Llama + 闭源 Muse 并行
发布 72 小时下载 88 万次，超过所有 Llama 历史首日纪录
key_points_en: Llama 5 405B dense architecture, ranks #4 on LMArena, largest open-weights dense model
MMLU-Pro 82.4%, GPQA Diamond 71.8%, SWE-Bench Verified 71.3%
Zuckerberg formalizes 'dual-track': open Llama + closed Muse in parallel
880k downloads in 72 hours, surpassing every prior Llama first-day

articles.title: Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B 登顶 Mac 端可跑开源第一，M3 Ultra 512GB 支持 4bit 量化本地推理
articles.title_en: Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B Tops Mac-Runnable Open Source, 4-bit Quantized Local Inference on M3 Ultra 512GB
articles.summary: 阿里通义千问 7 月 3 日发布 Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B（激活 3B 的 MoE 架构），LLMCheck 综合评分 76 分，成为 M3 Ultra 512GB Mac 本地可跑的开源第一。4bit 量化后模型占用约 18GB，推理速度 87 Token/s。阿里同期开源 Qwen 4.1 235B 与 Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B，形成完整的「大中小」三档开源阵列。Hugging Face 官方数据：Qwen 系列 7 月月度下载量已经追平 Llama 系列，成为全球第二大开源模型家族。
articles.summary_en: Alibaba Tongyi Qianwen released Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B on July 3—an MoE with 3B active parameters. LLMCheck composite score of 76 makes it the top Mac-runnable open-source model on M3 Ultra 512GB. 4-bit quantized footprint is ~18GB with 87 tokens/s inference. Alibaba simultaneously open-sourced Qwen 4.1 235B and Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B, completing a 'large-mid-small' three-tier open lineup. Hugging Face: Qwen's July monthly downloads now tie Llama, making it the world's #2 open-source model family.
articles.content: 阿里通义千问 7 月 3 日发布 Qwen 4.1 系列：主打款 Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B（32B 总参数、激活 3B 的 MoE 架构）在 LLMCheck 综合评分拿到 76 分，成为 M3 Ultra 512GB Mac 本地可跑的开源第一。4bit 量化后模型占用约 18GB，推理速度 87 Token/s（比 Llama 3.3 70B 快 3.4 倍）。同期开源的还有 Qwen 4.1 235B（大档，MMLU-Pro 78.9%）与 Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B（专精编码，SWE-Bench Verified 51.2%）。Hugging Face 官方数据显示——Qwen 系列 7 月月度下载量已经追平 Llama 系列（合计约 4200 万次/月），成为全球第二大开源模型家族。Qwen 采用 Apache 2.0 完全商用许可（对比 Llama Community License 更宽松）——中国的开源阵营在 2026 年 7 月同时收获「许可最宽松 + 下载量第二 + Mac 端第一」的三项标签。
articles.content_en: Alibaba Tongyi Qianwen released Qwen 4.1 on July 3: the flagship Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B (32B total, 3B active MoE) scored 76 on LLMCheck composite—the top Mac-runnable open source on M3 Ultra 512GB. 4-bit quantized footprint ~18GB, inference speed 87 tokens/s (3.4x faster than Llama 3.3 70B). Also open-sourced: Qwen 4.1 235B (large, MMLU-Pro 78.9%) and Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B (coding-specialized, SWE-Bench Verified 51.2%). Hugging Face data: Qwen's July monthly downloads (~42M/mo) tied Llama, making it the world's #2 open-source family. Qwen uses Apache 2.0 (more permissive than Llama Community License)—China's open camp secured 'most permissive license + #2 downloads + Mac #1' in July 2026.
key_points: Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B LLMCheck 综合 76 分，M3 Ultra 512GB Mac 本地可跑开源第一
4bit 量化后 18GB，推理速度 87 Token/s，比 Llama 3.3 70B 快 3.4 倍
同期开源 Qwen 4.1 235B（大档）+ Coder 8B（编码）三档齐发
Qwen 月度下载量追平 Llama，Apache 2.0 商用许可
key_points_en: Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B scores 76 on LLMCheck, top Mac-runnable on M3 Ultra 512GB
4-bit quantized ~18GB, 87 tokens/s—3.4x faster than Llama 3.3 70B
Simultaneous open-source of Qwen 4.1 235B (large) + Coder 8B (coding)
Qwen monthly downloads tie Llama; Apache 2.0 commercial license

articles.title: 韩国宣布 5760 亿美元 AI 国家投资计划：三星、SK 海力士、Naver、Kakao 联合入场
articles.title_en: Korea Announces $576B National AI Investment Plan: Samsung, SK Hynix, Naver, Kakao Join Forces
articles.summary: 韩国总统李在明 7 月 10 日在青瓦台宣布《K-AI 2028》国家 AI 投资计划——2026-2028 年三年投入 800 兆韩元（约 5760 亿美元），是韩国历史上单一产业最大规模的政府投资。核心动作四项：其一，三星电子 + SK 海力士承接 60% 的 HBM4 全球产能；其二，Naver 与 Kakao 各投 15 兆韩元建全国 AI 云；其三，2027 年前建 3GW 主权 AI 数据中心；其四，与美国 CHIPS Act、日本 K Program 形成三边 AI 联盟。
articles.summary_en: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung announced 'K-AI 2028' at the Blue House on July 10—a three-year national AI investment plan of ₩800 trillion (~$576B) for 2026-2028, the largest single-industry government spend in Korean history. Four core actions: (1) Samsung + SK Hynix to take 60% of global HBM4 capacity; (2) Naver and Kakao each invest ₩15T in a national AI cloud; (3) build 3GW sovereign AI data center by 2027; (4) form a trilateral AI alliance with US CHIPS Act and Japan K Program.
articles.content: 韩国 AI 主权化押注 7 月 10 日正式官宣。总统李在明在青瓦台发布《K-AI 2028》——2026-2028 年三年投入 800 兆韩元（约 5760 亿美元），是韩国历史上单一产业最大规模的政府投资，超过韩国国防预算 2 年总和。四项核心动作——其一，三星电子 + SK 海力士承接全球 HBM4 产能的 60%（合计约 130 万片/月），锁定 NVIDIA/AMD/OpenAI Jalapeño/Anthropic Vega 未来 3 年的 HBM 采购；其二，Naver 与 Kakao 各投 15 兆韩元建「全国 AI 云」——Naver 主战企业客户、Kakao 主战消费者客户，两家各承担 3GW 数据中心容量；其三，2027 年前在忠清南道建 3GW「主权 AI 数据中心」，专用于韩语 AI 模型训练、政府政务大模型、韩国传统制造业 AI 化改造；其四，与美国 CHIPS Act、日本 K Program 形成「东亚 AI 三边联盟」，共同应对中国 GLM/Qwen/DeepSeek 的开源攻势。市场解读——这份计划把三星、SK 海力士、Naver、Kakao 四家韩国科技巨头绑定成「国家队」，未来 3 年韩国 AI 产业规模预计从 47 亿美元冲到 380 亿美元。
articles.content_en: Korea's AI sovereignty bet was formalized on July 10. President Lee Jae-myung announced 'K-AI 2028' at the Blue House—₩800T (~$576B) over 2026-2028, the largest single-industry government spend in Korean history, exceeding two years of Korea's defense budget. Four core actions: (1) Samsung + SK Hynix to secure 60% of global HBM4 capacity (~1.3M wafers/mo combined), locking in HBM procurement for NVIDIA/AMD/OpenAI Jalapeño/Anthropic Vega over the next 3 years; (2) Naver and Kakao each invest ₩15T in a 'national AI cloud'—Naver targeting enterprise, Kakao consumer, each with 3GW data-center capacity; (3) build a 3GW 'sovereign AI data center' in South Chungcheong by 2027, dedicated to Korean-language model training, government policy LLMs, and traditional-manufacturing AI transformation; (4) form an 'East Asia AI trilateral' with US CHIPS Act and Japan K Program to counter China's GLM/Qwen/DeepSeek open-source push. Market read: the plan binds Samsung, SK Hynix, Naver, Kakao as a national team. Korean AI industry is projected to grow from $4.7B (2026) to $38B (2029).
key_points: K-AI 2028：3 年 800 兆韩元（5760 亿美元），韩国历史最大单一产业投资
三星 + SK 海力士拿下全球 HBM4 产能 60%（130 万片/月）
2027 年前建 3GW 主权 AI 数据中心，专用韩语 AI 训练
美国 CHIPS Act + 日本 K Program + K-AI 2028 形成东亚 AI 三边联盟
key_points_en: K-AI 2028: ₩800T ($576B) over 3 years, Korea's largest single-industry spend
Samsung + SK Hynix secure 60% of global HBM4 capacity (1.3M wafers/mo)
3GW sovereign AI data center by 2027, dedicated to Korean-language training
US CHIPS Act + Japan K Program + K-AI 2028 form East Asia AI trilateral

articles.title: xAI 60 亿美元收购 Anysphere（Cursor 母公司），马斯克拿下 AI 编程赛道最大标的
articles.title_en: xAI Acquires Anysphere (Cursor's Parent) for $60B—Musk Takes AI's Largest Coding Asset
articles.summary: xAI 7 月 5 日官宣以 600 亿美元收购 Anysphere（AI 编程工具 Cursor 母公司），是 2026 年迄今 AI 领域最大规模的战略并购。Anysphere 2026 年 6 月估值 320 亿美元、ARR 突破 12 亿美元、月活开发者 480 万。收购完成后 Cursor 将与 xAI 的 Grok 4.5 编码能力深度融合，同时保留 Cursor 独立品牌。这份交易让 Grok 一夜之间成为「唯一同时拥有开发者入口 + 前沿模型 + 数据中心 + 卫星带宽」的 AI 帝国。
articles.summary_en: xAI announced on July 5 the $60B acquisition of Anysphere (parent of AI coding tool Cursor)—the largest strategic AI M&A of 2026 to date. Anysphere was valued at $32B in June 2026, with $1.2B ARR and 4.8M MAU developers. Post-close, Cursor integrates with xAI's Grok 4.5 coding capability while retaining its independent brand. The deal makes Grok overnight the only AI empire with 'developer entry + frontier model + data center + satellite bandwidth'.
articles.content: 2026 年迄今 AI 领域最大规模的战略并购 7 月 5 日拍板——xAI 以 600 亿美元（现金 180 亿 + xAI 股权 420 亿）收购 Anysphere（Cursor 母公司）。Anysphere 2026 年 6 月估值 320 亿美元、ARR 12 亿美元、月活开发者 480 万——xAI 支付的 600 亿相当于 6 月估值的 1.9 倍，属于「战略溢价」。收购后 Cursor 将保留独立品牌与独立产品线，但底层模型深度切换到 Grok 4.5 Coder，同时接入 Colossus 集群的算力。这份交易的战略意义在于——马斯克一夜之间拥有了「唯一同时拥有开发者入口（Cursor 480 万开发者）+ 前沿模型（Grok 4.5）+ 数据中心（Memphis Colossus 55 万 GPU）+ 卫星带宽（Starlink）」的 AI 帝国。Cursor 联合创始人 Michael Truell 与 Aman Sanger 加入 xAI 高管团队，分别出任 CPO 与 VP Engineering。反面看，OpenAI 曾在 2026 Q1 用 300 亿美元报价被 Anysphere 拒绝——这份价格差正好说明马斯克为「战略卡位」多付了 300 亿。
articles.content_en: The largest strategic AI M&A of 2026 closed on July 5—xAI acquires Anysphere (parent of Cursor) for $60B ($18B cash + $42B xAI equity). Anysphere was valued at $32B in June 2026 with $1.2B ARR and 4.8M MAU developers—xAI paid 1.9x the June valuation, a strategic premium. Post-close, Cursor keeps its brand and product independence but the underlying model deep-switches to Grok 4.5 Coder and connects to Colossus compute. Strategic significance: Musk overnight owns the only AI empire with 'developer entry (Cursor's 4.8M developers) + frontier model (Grok 4.5) + data center (Memphis Colossus 550k GPUs) + satellite bandwidth (Starlink)'. Cursor co-founders Michael Truell and Aman Sanger join xAI's executive team as CPO and VP Engineering. Context: OpenAI reportedly bid $30B in Q1 2026 and was rejected—Musk paid $30B more for strategic positioning.
key_points: xAI 600 亿美元收购 Anysphere（Cursor 母公司），2026 年最大 AI 并购
Anysphere 6 月估值 320 亿美元、ARR 12 亿、月活开发者 480 万
Cursor 保留独立品牌，底层模型切换到 Grok 4.5 Coder，接入 Colossus
OpenAI Q1 曾报价 300 亿被拒，马斯克多付 300 亿完成战略卡位
key_points_en: xAI acquires Anysphere (Cursor's parent) for $60B—largest AI M&A of 2026
Anysphere June valuation $32B, $1.2B ARR, 4.8M MAU developers
Cursor keeps brand independence, model switches to Grok 4.5 Coder, on Colossus
OpenAI reportedly bid $30B in Q1 and was rejected—Musk paid $30B premium for positioning

articles.title: WAIC 2026 世界人工智能大会进入倒计时：7 月 26-29 日上海举办，聚焦「智能体、AI 主权、开源全球化」三主线
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Countdown: Shanghai July 26-29 to Focus on 'Agents, AI Sovereignty, Open-Source Globalization'
articles.summary: 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）主办方 7 月 11 日公布倒计时议程：7 月 26-29 日在上海世博展览馆举行，主题「智能向新，全球共治」，聚焦「智能体、AI 主权、开源全球化」三主线。已确认出席的国际嘉宾包括 Yann LeCun、Fei-Fei Li、Yoshua Bengio、Andrew Ng。中方阵容包括李彦宏（百度）、王小川（百川）、张鹏（智谱）、梁文锋（DeepSeek）、王兴兴（宇树科技）。上海市同期发布《人工智能+行动方案 2026-2028》，明确到 2028 年上海 AI 产业规模突破 4000 亿元。
articles.summary_en: The 2026 World AI Conference (WAIC) countdown agenda was released on July 11: held at Shanghai Expo Center July 26-29 under the theme 'Toward Smart, Toward Global Governance', focused on three tracks—Agents, AI Sovereignty, Open-Source Globalization. Confirmed international speakers: Yann LeCun, Fei-Fei Li, Yoshua Bengio, Andrew Ng. Chinese lineup: Robin Li (Baidu), Wang Xiaochuan (Baichuan), Zhang Peng (Zhipu), Liang Wenfeng (DeepSeek), Wang Xingxing (Unitree). Shanghai simultaneously released the 'AI+ Action Plan 2026-2028', targeting ¥400B in Shanghai AI industry by 2028.
articles.source: 上海经信委 / WAIC 官网
articles.content: 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）进入 15 天倒计时——主办方 7 月 11 日公布完整议程：7 月 26-29 日在上海世博展览馆举行，主题「智能向新，全球共治」，聚焦「智能体（Agents）、AI 主权（Sovereignty）、开源全球化（Open Source Global）」三主线。已确认出席的国际嘉宾阵容包括 Yann LeCun（Meta 首席 AI 科学家）、Fei-Fei Li（斯坦福 HAI 主任）、Yoshua Bengio（图灵奖得主）、Andrew Ng（DeepLearning.AI 创始人）——是 WAIC 6 年历史上国际嘉宾阵容最强的一届。中方阵容包括李彦宏（百度）、王小川（百川智能）、张鹏（智谱 AI）、梁文锋（DeepSeek）、王兴兴（宇树科技）、汤晓鸥（商汤，遗憾其已过世由团队代表出席）、周鸿祎（360）。同期上海市政府发布《人工智能+行动方案 2026-2028》，明确到 2028 年上海 AI 产业规模突破 4000 亿元、AI 企业超过 2000 家、AI 场景应用超过 500 个。WAIC 2026 期间预计将有超过 800 家全球 AI 公司参展、发布 200+ 款新产品、签署 50+ 项跨境合作协议。
articles.content_en: The 2026 World AI Conference (WAIC) entered 15-day countdown—organizers released the full agenda on July 11: July 26-29 at Shanghai Expo Center under 'Toward Smart, Toward Global Governance', focused on three tracks: Agents, AI Sovereignty, Open-Source Globalization. Confirmed international lineup: Yann LeCun (Meta Chief AI Scientist), Fei-Fei Li (Stanford HAI Director), Yoshua Bengio (Turing Award laureate), Andrew Ng (DeepLearning.AI founder)—the strongest international roster in WAIC's 6-year history.
